On Gemma 4, comply and refuse responses separated by a 0.647-point gap with zero overlap (n=75), though this is preliminary, with a narrow catalog, within-sample calibration, and Gemma-family-only SAE coverage. Built over one hackathon weekend on consumer hardware (GTX 1650 Ti Max-Q, plus Colab T4 for SAE training), this preliminary evidence suggests activation-level auditing may surface failure modes invisible to behavioral evaluation, with substantial variation across architectures.

</details>


### [445] [Modularizing Educational LLM-Agency for Fostering Responsible Learning Assistance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30187)
*Julius Gabelmann,Felix Jahn,Kevin Baum,Sophie van Rossum,Emely Wuenscher,Timo P. Gros,Verena Wolf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向教育的智能AI聊天机器人架构，通过模块化设计帮助学生在解题过程中遵循教学原则，以提升AI在教育中的可控性、透明性和可监督性，促进负责任的AI使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模语言模型虽能获取教育科学见解，但缺乏遵循教学概念的倾向，可能导致学生丧失迁移能力、批判性思维和创造力，亟需设计更负责任的AI教育系统。

Method: 识别负责任的LLM教育系统应满足的若干需求，论证单体开箱即用解决方案的结构性缺陷，提出模块化智能体架构，针对不同解题阶段设计特定模块，融入针对性教学指导。

Result: 提出了一种模块化的智能体聊天机器人架构，能够在解题各阶段实现可控、透明、可监督的教学引导。

Conclusion: 模块化智能体架构相较于单体方案，能更好地将教学原则融入AI教育系统，有助于实现负责任的教育AI部署。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of AI chatbots in education will drastically change learning, making responsible deployment a critical concern. While large language models (LLMs) might have access to sources discussing insights from educational sciences, they are not particularly inclined to adhere to pedagogical concepts, risking negative effects on the learning process, such as a loss of transfer capabilities, critical thinking, or creativity. In this paper, we introduce an agentic AI chatbot architecture assisting students with exercise solving, specifically designed to contribute to more responsible AI use in education. We base our conceptual development on the identification of several desiderata for responsible LLM-based educational systems, argue for the structural shortcomings inherent in monolithic, out-of-the-box solutions, and instead suggest modularizing the agentic architecture. We propose specific modules for different stages of exercise solving, enabling incorporation of targeted pedagogical advice, guiding students through the learning process in a more controllable, transparent, and overseeable manner.

</details>


### [446] [Double-Edged Sword or Sharp Tool? Designing and Evaluating Triadic LLM-Teacher Collaboration for K-12 Writing at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30200)
*Canran Wang,Yuwen Yang,Zhen Wang,Ming Ma,Ding Yu,Chentai Wang,Keman Huang,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种LLM-教师-学生三方协作系统，用于K-12写作教学。基于57,954篇作文的大规模实证研究，发现LLM作为生成引擎减轻教师负担，教师作为教学把关人保证反馈质量，但过度语言扩展存在边际效用递减的瓶颈效应，建议随学生能力提升动态调整LLM-教师协作策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将LLM整合到K-12写作教育中存在挑战，需要有效的LLM-教师-学生三方协作机制。现有研究缺乏大规模实证数据支持，亟需探索如何合理分配LLM与教师的角色以最大化教学效果。

Method: 构建了基于系统功能语言学的多维评估框架和反馈追踪管道，开发了三方协作系统，收集了来自120所学校10,195名学生的57,954篇作文，进行了为期两年的大规模实证研究。

Result: 系统有效提升了写作质量。LLM作为生成引擎减轻教师倦怠，教师作为教学把关人保证反馈质量。发现语言扩展存在瓶颈效应：过度语言扩展带来边际效用递减。

Conclusion: LLM和教师对技能提升都至关重要，但随着学生能力提升，需要采用动态自适应的LLM-教师协作策略，避免过度依赖语言扩展造成效率下降。

Abstract: The double-edged sword of integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) requires an effective triadic collaboration mechanism among LLMs, teachers and students, especially for K-12 education. By developing a triadic collaboration system to support K-12 writing learning, a multidimensional evaluation framework grounded in Systemic Functional Linguistics and the suggestion trajectory tracing pipeline, this paper contributes a large-scale empirical dataset involving $57,954$ essays from $10,195$ students across $120$ schools over two years. Our findings confirm the efficacy of this system in improving writing quality through a strategic labor division: the LLM serves as a generative engine to mitigate teacher burnout, and the teacher acts as a pedagogical gatekeeper and bridge to guarantee feedback quality. While both LLM and teacher are critical for skill improvement, we uncover a ceiling effect where excessive linguistic expansion yields diminishing marginal utility. These suggest a dynamically adaptive LLM-teacher collaboration as student proficiency increases.

</details>


### [447] [Persona Conditioning of Brand Recommendations in Retrieval-Augmented Commercial Chat: A Prominence-Stratified Cross-Provider Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30207)
*Will Jack,Noah Lehman,Keller Maloney,Sarah Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究审计了AI助手在面对不同买家角色（如个人创业者、企业VP、英国中小企业主）时，即使使用相同提示词（如"最佳CRM软件"），其品牌推荐结果会发生显著变化。通过2000次实验发现，添加角色前缀使推荐集相似度下降0.12-0.20；市场领导者受角色影响较小（80%一致性），而中端品牌受角色影响可达75%的品牌替换率。Anthropic模型比OpenAI模型受角色影响更大，这与前者更依赖训练数据先验有关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI助手广泛应用于商业决策支持场景，但不同身份背景的买家使用相同提示词时，模型可能因其对用户角色的推断而产生系统性偏见。现有研究缺乏对此类情境依赖性对品牌推荐影响的量化审计，因此需要系统性地测量角色上下文如何重塑AI的品牌推荐结果。

Method: 实验设计空间：10种人物角色 × 8个提示词变体 × 3种模型配置（OpenAI两个配置覆盖全部8个提示词，Anthropic Sonnet-4.6/low仅覆盖4个提示词）× N=10次重复，共计2000次运行。使用Jaccard相似度衡量推荐集一致性，通过聚类95%置信区间评估角色前缀的影响。

Result: 添加角色前缀使推荐集相似度下降Delta=-0.12至-0.20（聚类95%CI不含零）。市场领导者品牌角色抵抗性强（约80%跨角色品牌一致性），但中端品牌随角色变化换掉高达75%的推荐品牌。Anthropic模型点估计效应大于OpenAI配置（尽管聚类CI重叠），与该模型43-52%推荐缺乏可观测检索层证据（vs OpenAI的8-29%）一致。

Conclusion: AI品牌感知的任何测量都必须以买方角色为条件——相同提示词因模型认为提问者身份不同而产生实质性不同的推荐集。聚合不同角色的测量协议会系统性地掩盖这种变异。角色效应集中在中端品牌，且在更依赖训练数据先验的生成路径上最大。

Abstract: The same prompt -- "best CRM software" -- reaches AI assistants from buyers in widely different contexts: a solo founder, an enterprise VP, a UK SMB owner. We audit how strongly that contextual variation reshapes which brands the model recommends. The audit samples 2,000 runs over a design space of 10 personas x 8 prompts x 3 model configurations x N=10 reps, with the two OpenAI cells at full 8-prompt coverage and the Anthropic sonnet-4.6 / low cell at 4-prompt coverage. Prefixing the user message with a persona drops the recommendation-set similarity (Jaccard) by Delta = -0.12 to -0.20 relative to a same-persona baseline (clustered 95% CIs exclude zero on all three measured cells; the sonnet cell's CI rests on only 4 prompt clusters and is correspondingly wider). The effect is sharply prominence-stratified: category leaders are persona-resistant (~80% same-brand consistency across personas), but mid-market brands swap up to 75% of the recommendation set as the persona changes. The Anthropic model shows a larger point-estimate effect than the OpenAI configurations, though clustered CIs overlap for the closer contrast (sonnet vs. OpenAI/high); the asymmetry is consistent with Anthropic's more retrieval-unattributed generation route (43-52% recommendations without observed retrieval-layer evidence, vs OpenAI's 8-29%, documented in Jack 2026). Any measurement of AI brand perception must condition on the buyer persona supplying the query: the same prompt produces materially different recommendation sets depending on who the model thinks is asking, and a measurement protocol that aggregates across personas systematically obscures that variation. The effect concentrates at mid-market and is largest on the most priors-reliant generation route in our audit, consistent with persona responsiveness growing as models lean more on training-data priors and richer context integration.

</details>


### [448] [When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30219)
*Haoming Xu,Weihong Xu,Zongrui Li,Mengru Wang,Yunzhi Yao,Chiyu Wu,Jin Shang,Yu Gong,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文信念管理（CBM）任务，研究长程交互中语言模型如何管理累积信息。引入BeliefTrack基准和符号验证器实现精确评估，发现强化学习可降低70.9%的失败率，表征级引导可降低46.1%的失败率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长程交互中语言模型需要管理不断累积的信息（何时更新、保留或忽略状态），但缺乏系统性的评估方法。

Method: 提出CBM任务框架；构建BeliefTrack基准（包括规则发现和电路诊断两个任务，使用封闭信念空间和符号验证器）；采用强化学习（信念状态奖励）和表征级引导方法。

Result: 强化学习使失败率平均降低70.9%；表征级引导在两项任务上降低46.1%的失败率。

Conclusion: 现有LLM在信念管理上存在严重缺陷，强化学习和表征引导可有效缓解，但仍有改进空间。

Abstract: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. We study this challenge as \textbf{Contextual Belief Management (CBM)}: maintaining a predicted belief state aligned with formal evidence while isolating task-irrelevant noise. To make CBM measurable, we introduce BeliefTrack, a closed-world benchmark spanning Rule Discovery and Circuit Diagnosis, where a finite belief space and symbolic verifiers enable exact turn-level evaluation. BeliefTrack diagnoses three failures: Failed Stay, Failed Update, and Failed Isolation. Across multiple LLMs, vanilla models exhibit severe CBM failures, while explicit belief-tracking prompts provide limited gains. In contrast, reinforcement learning with belief-state rewards reduces failure rates by 70.9\% on average. Further probing reveals latent belief-state dynamics behind these failures, and representation-level steering reduces failure rates by 46.1\% across two tasks\footnote{Code is coming soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/CBM.

</details>


### [449] [mcp-proto-okn: Natural-language access to open scientific knowledge graphs through the Model Context Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30283)
*Peter W. Rose,Benjamin M. Good,Amanda M. Saravia-Butler,Charlotte A. Nelson,James P. Balhoff,Yaphet Kebede,Patricia L. Whetzel,Christopher Bizon,Andrew I. Su,Sergio E. Baranzini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: mcp-proto-okn 是一个基于 Python 的模型上下文协议服务器，能让 AI 助手通过自然语言发现、查询和整合科学知识图谱，降低跨域知识图谱分析门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降低生物医学和科学用户进行跨领域知识图谱分析的门槛，使非技术用户也能通过自然语言与知识图谱交互。

Method: 基于 FastMCP 框架用 Python 实现，提供图谱路由、模式检查、SPARQL 执行、本体扩展、多图查询和转录生成等功能。

Result: 实现了 AI 助手通过自然语言对科学知识图谱的发现、检查、查询和集成能力。

Conclusion: mcp-proto-okn 提供了一套完整的工具链，有效降低了科学知识图谱分析的使用门槛，并已在 GitHub 开源。

Abstract: MCP Server Proto-OKN (mcp-proto-okn) is a Python-based Model Context Protocol server that enables AI assistants to discover, inspect, query and integrate scientific knowledge graphs through natural language. The server provides graph routing, schema inspection, SPARQL execution, ontology expansion, multi-graph querying, and transcript generation, lowering the barrier to cross-domain knowledge graph analysis for biomedical and scientific users.
  mcp-proto-okn is implemented in Python using the FastMCP framework and is available at https://github.com/sbl-sdsc/mcp-proto-okn. Documentation, client configuration instructions, and example analysis transcripts are provided in the GitHub repository.

</details>


### [450] [ProjectionBench: Evaluating Scientific Hypothesis Generation in LLMs Under Progressive Information Disclosure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30284)
*A. J. Lew,Y. Cao,M. J. Buehler*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种渐进式信息揭示的基准框架，用于评估LLM在科学发现中的创新推理能力，并在45篇论文上测试了多个模型，发现GPT-5.4在极少信息下仍能保持0.7 F1与真实结论对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要测试多跳检索能力，未能评估模型在科学发现中所需的创新推理能力。

Method: 构建渐进式信息揭示框架：从仅给主题和研究问题开始，逐步提供技术细节，在每个阶段让模型生成假设，并与原始论文结论进行原子主张的语义相似度对比。

Result: GPT-5.4和Gemini 3.1 pro优于前代模型；GPT-5.4在最小上下文下仍保持0.7 F1的语义对齐。

Conclusion: 该框架能系统评估LLM从创新性到基础推理的科学发现能力，对下一代AI科学家系统的开发有重要意义。

Abstract: Scientific discovery is an inherently creative and uncertain process, requiring reasoning beyond the recall of known knowledge. While many benchmarks have been proposed to evaluate large language model (LLM) performance on deep research tasks via multi-hop retrieval, their innovative reasoning abilities essential for true scientific discovery remain largely untested. We introduce a benchmark framework for evaluating model performance in scientific discovery and reasoning, building up from a raw problem to the classical null hypothesis test. In our framework, models initially receive only the topic and research question from a recent paper, with technical details progressively revealed. At each stage of information disclosure, the model is tasked with generating hypotheses that address the research question, which is compared with the conclusions from the original paper and evaluated via automated semantic similarity of constituent atomic claims. This progressive evaluation of semantic divergence from ground-truth conclusions enables assessment of a model's innovativeness (under minimal information) to grounded reasoning capabilities (under full experimental details), both critical for using LLMs for scientific discovery purposes. Our framework provides a foundation for systematically evaluating scientific reasoning and discovery capabilities in LLMs, crucial for advancing the development of next-generation AI scientist/co-scientist systems. Specifically, here we evaluate GPT-5, GPT-5.4, Gemini 2.5 pro, and Gemini 3.1 pro preview across 45 papers spanning bioactive materials, mechanical materials, and nanomaterials. We find that GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 pro outperform their previous generation counterparts as expected, and GPT-5.4 in particular maintains 0.7 F1 score alignment with ground truth conclusions even under minimal context.

</details>


### [451] [MIRA: Mid-training Rubric Anchoring for Source-Aware Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30288)
*Haowen Wang,Yaxin Du,Jian Yang,Jiajun Wu,Shukai Liu,Yuxuan Zhang,Pingjie Wang,Siheng Chen,Tuney Zheng,Ming Zhou,Xianglong Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MIRA是一种基于自锚定规则发现的源感知过滤框架，用于大语言模型的中期训练数据选择。它先为每个数据源组自动发现评估规则，再蒸馏为可扩展的评分器进行全语料过滤。在代码导向的中期训练中，使用一半token即匹配全语料性能，并在9个代码基准上超越其他选择方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型基方法可扩展但只提供隐式质量信号，语义选择方法判断力强但需固定规则或标准化格式。中期训练的数据来自异构源，需同时具备可扩展性和源自适应语义标准，现有方法无法满足这一需求。

Method: MIRA框架：(1) 对每个源组自动发现应评估的规则（自锚定规则发现）；(2) 将这些判断蒸馏为可扩展的学生评分器；(3) 对全语料进行过滤筛选。

Result: 在21个来源、5个源组的代码导向中期训练中，MIRA在9个代码基准上超越所有选择基线，仅用一半训练token即达到全语料训练的性能水平。

Conclusion: 将规则构建纳入数据选择过程本身是有效的，MIRA通过源自适应语义过滤解决了中期训练数据选择的可扩展性与语义判断力的矛盾。

Abstract: Mid-training has become an important stage in modern LLM development, using large-scale curated mixtures to strengthen capabilities before final post-training. Its data selection problem is distinct: the data are optimized under a pretraining-style objective at near-pretraining scale, but are curated toward downstream capabilities and drawn from heterogeneous sources with different formats and training roles. As a result, effective selection requires both scalability and source-adaptive semantic criteria. Existing model-based methods scale well, but provide only implicit quality signals. Semantic selection methods offer stronger judgments, but usually assume fixed rubrics or standardized data formats. To address this mismatch, we propose MIRA, a source-aware filtering framework based on self-anchored rubric discovery. The key idea is to make rubric construction part of data selection: MIRA first discovers what should be evaluated for each source group, then distills those judgments into scalable student scorers for full-corpus filtering. On code-oriented mid-training with 21 sources and 5 source groups, MIRA outperforms selection baselines across nine code benchmarks and matches the full-corpus run while using only half the tokens.

</details>


### [452] [Demystifying Data Organization for Enhanced LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30334)
*Yalun Dai,Yangyu Huang,Tongshen Yang,Yonghan Wang,Xin Zhang,Wenshan Wu,Qihao Zhao,Hao Li,Yuanyuan Gao,Kim-Hui Yap,Scarlett Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了数据组织（而非数据选择）对LLM训练的影响，提出了四个关键准则（边界锐化、循环调度、课程连续性、局部多样性），并据此设计了两种数据排序方法STR和SAW，在预训练和SFT阶段均验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM训练效率高度依赖数据策展，但已有研究多聚焦于数据选择，而数据组织（排序方式）对训练的影响缺乏系统探索，尤其是LLM通常只训练1-2个epochs的情况下，数据顺序的重要性更为突出。

Method: 复用预计算好的样本级分数（原本用于数据效率评估），设计两种数据排序方法：STR（基于边界锐化+循环调度）和SAW（基于课程连续性+局部多样性），以最小化额外计算开销。

Result: 在多个模型规模、数据规模、预训练和SFT阶段的大量实验表明，所提出的数据组织准则和排序方法能够显著提升LLM训练的稳定性和最终性能。

Conclusion: 数据组织（而非仅仅是数据选择）对LLM训练至关重要，四个准则具有通用指导意义，STR和SAW方法在几乎不增加计算开销的前提下有效提升了训练效果。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized various fields, yet their training efficiency is heavily reliant on effective data curation. While data selection has been widely studied, the strategic data organization for enhanced training remains an underexplored area, particularly since current LLMs are often trained for only one or a few epochs. This paper systematically explores the influence of data organization on LLM training by reusing pre-computed sample-level scores originally generated for data efficiency, thereby incurring minimal additional computational overhead. We identify and formalize four key guidelines for optimizing data organization: Boundary Sharpening, Cyclic Scheduling, Curriculum Continuity, and Local Diversity. Guided by them, we introduce two novel data ordering methods termed STR and SAW. Extensive experiments across different model scales and data sizes, encompassing both pre-training and SFT stages, validate the effectiveness of our summarized guidelines. They also demonstrate the robustness of our proposed data ordering methods in enhancing the stability and performance of LLM training. Github Link: https://github.com/microsoft/data-efficacy/

</details>


### [453] [Locally Coherent, Globally Incoherent: Bounding Compositional Incoherence in Multi-Component LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30335)
*Anany Kotawala*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 多组件LLM代理在局部一致但全局不一致时会产生概率违反基本公理的问题。本文形式化了这种残差ε*，提出了一种分层修复方法，并通过经验验证了该问题在现实系统中的普遍性及多种缓解策略的失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多组件LLM代理系统各自处理部分信息后组合概率声明，可能会违反概率公理（如归一化、非负性、可加性），即便每个组件局部一致。需要形式化描述并量化这种不一致性，并寻找修复与监测方法。

Method: 提出残差ε*度量（L2距离），利用乘积结构二分法和Rayleigh商预测残差；采用Boyle-Dykstra分层投影进行确定性修复；使用e-process进行在线一致性监控。在1,876个团上的四LLM面板实验验证。

Result: ε*>0出现在33-94%的团中；在1,770个已结算赌注上，比例分配规则下每赌注遗憾增加+0.115 nats；当赌注者自身先进行一致性修正时，增益降至+0.006。三种直观缓解策略均失败或倒退。

Conclusion: 多组件LLM代理系统的全局概率不一致性是普遍且严重的，简单的缓解策略无法解决，需要更根本的数学框架来确保组合概率的全局一致性。

Abstract: Multi-component LLM agents assemble probabilistic claims from components that each see only part of a joint problem; the composition can violate basic probability axioms even when every component is locally coherent. We formalise this locally coherent, globally incoherent failure via the compositional residual eps*, the L2 distance from the composed quote to the joint coherent polytope, computable at runtime from system output and the declared cross-component coupling constraints. A product-structure dichotomy characterises when local coherence suffices, and a Rayleigh-quotient prediction matches the observed residual within 7% on three of four relation classes. A hierarchical Boyle-Dykstra projection repairs the composition deterministically; an anytime-valid e-process gives sequential coherence monitoring. Across 1,876 ensemble cliques on a four-LLM mid-tier panel (frontier-panel rerun in Section 5.5), eps* > 0 on 33-94% of cliques, translating to +0.115 nats per bet of regret on 1,770 resolved bets under the proportional allocation rule (the gain collapses to +0.006 under bettors that themselves coherentise). Three intuitive LLM-side mitigations(retrieval, partition-aware prompting, aggregator-LLM) each fail or regress.

</details>


### [454] [Tiny but Trusted: Efficient Vision-Language Reasoning for Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30344)
*Xiaona Zhou,Muntasir Wahed,Tianjiao Yu,Constantin Brif,Ismini Lourentzou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了VisAnomBench基准（从公开时序数据构建并附有高质量异常解释），并基于此微调出VisAnomReasoner模型，在时序异常检测中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在时序异常检测中表现不佳，且公开基准只提供区间标注而缺乏自然语言解释，难以微调出可解释的异常检测模型。

Method: 1) 构建VisAnomBench：从公开时序数据集出发，利用多个大型VLM和细粒度任务奖励筛选高质量异常解释；2) 微调VisAnomReasoner：基于该基准对VLM进行参数高效微调，实现时序异常检测与解释。

Result: VisAnomReasoner在VisAnomBench上精度和F1分别提升至少21.23和23.87个百分点；在TSB-AD-U跨基准测试中精度和F1分别提升9.57和13.39个百分点。

Conclusion: 通过构建带自然语言解释的基准并进行微调，VisAnomReasoner在时序异常检测上取得了更准确的定位和更强的泛化能力。

Abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance across many tasks, yet prior studies report unsatisfactory performance when applying large language or multimodal models to finding abnormal patterns in sequential data. Public anomaly detection benchmarks typically provide interval annotations but not natural-language rationales, making it difficult to fine-tune VLMs to produce grounded, interpretable decisions. To address this gap, we construct VisAnomBench, a curated benchmark built from public time-series datasets and augmented with high-quality anomaly explanations selected from multiple large VLMs using fine-grained, task-specific rewards. Through fine-tuning on this benchmark, we develop VisAnomReasoner, a parameter-efficient VLM for time-series anomaly detection. Experimental results on VisAnomBench show that VisAnomReasoner achieves more accurate anomaly localization and consistently outperforms all baselines, with improvements of at least 21.23 and 23.87 percentage points in precision and F1, respectively. Additional experiments on the TSB-AD-U benchmark demonstrate strong cross-benchmark generalization, with VisAnomReasoner improving precision and F1 by 9.57 and 13.39 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [455] [SchGen: PCB Schematic Generation with Semantic-Grounded Code Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30345)
*Qinpei Luo,Ruichun Ma,Xinyu Zhang,Lili Qiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SchGen，首个从自然语言请求生成可编辑PCB原理图的大语言模型。核心贡献是设计了一种语义驱动的代码表示方法，将几何问题转化为语义匹配任务，并构建了大规模数据集。实验证明SchGen在线缆连接准确性和功能正确性上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PCB原理图设计高度依赖人工且知识密集型，尽管生成式AI在数字/模拟IC设计领域取得进展，但基于自然语言意图的PCB原理图生成仍属空白。现有原理图格式冗长、工具特定、几何描述繁重，难以被LLM可靠生成。

Method: 提出语义驱动的代码表示方法，编码原理图编辑原语（相对布局+基于引脚名的布线），将几何驱动的生成问题转化为语义驱动的匹配任务。通过人机协作流水线，将开源硬件设计转换为该表示，构建大规模PCB原理图-用户提示配对数据集。

Result: SchGen在线缆连接准确性和功能正确性上显著优于替代表示方法乃至更大规模通用LLM。

Conclusion: 表示设计在使生成模型胜任复杂硬件设计任务中起关键作用。

Abstract: Printed circuit board (PCB) schematic design defines nearly all electronic hardware, but it remains manual and expertise-intensive. While generative AI has advanced digital and analog IC design, PCB schematic generation from natural-language intent is largely unexplored. This paper presents SchGen, the first large language model that generates editable PCB schematics from natural-language requests. The key challenge lies in the lack of an LLM-suited representation and a large-scale dataset. Current schematic formats are dominated by verbose, tool-specific syntax and geometry-heavy descriptions, making them difficult to generate reliably. We introduce a semantically grounded code representation that encodes schematic editing primitives with relative placement and pin-name-based wiring, transforming a geometry-driven generation problem into a semantics-driven matching task amenable to LLMs. We further construct a large-scale dataset of PCB schematics paired with user prompts via a human-agent collaborative pipeline that converts open-source hardware designs into our representation. Experiments show that SchGen significantly outperforms alternative representations and even larger general-purpose LLMs on wire connectivity accuracy and functional correctness. Our results highlight the critical role of representation design in enabling generative models for complex hardware design tasks.

</details>


### [456] [Notation Matters: A Benchmark Study of Token-Optimized Formats in Agentic AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29676)
*Lorenz Kutschka,Bernhard Geiger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文评估了两种Token优化格式TOON和TRON在端到端Agent循环中的表现。TRON最多减少27%的Token，准确率在14个百分点以内；TOON减少18%的Token，准确率损失9个百分点，但存在多轮解析失败和并行工具调用崩溃的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: JSON在Agentic AI系统中用于工具调用时存在大量Token浪费，需要更高效的替代格式。

Method: 在四个Agent基准测试和五个开源大语言模型上评估TOON和TRON，分离输入压缩和输出压缩以独立衡量理解与生成能力。

Result: TRON最多减少27%的Token，TOON最多减少18%。但TOON在多轮交互中会出现解析错误累积，且大多数模型无法正确生成并行工具调用。

Conclusion: TRON在保持可接受准确率的前提下能有效减少Token消耗，是更优的选择；TOON在端到端Agent场景下存在显著缺陷，不适合实际使用。

Abstract: Large language models in Agentic AI systems consume tool schemas and execution results and emit tool invocations as structured data. The default language for that exchange, JSON, was designed for application-to-application interchange rather than token efficiency, so its structural elements impose substantial token overhead. Recent work proposes token-optimized alternatives such as TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) and TRON (Token Reduced Object Notation) as more compact replacements, but these formats have been evaluated only on isolated comprehension or generation tasks. Whether their token reductions hold inside end-to-end agentic loops therefore remains an open question. We evaluate TOON and TRON on four agentic benchmarks (BFCL, MCPToolBenchPP, MCP-Universe, StableToolBench) and five open-weight LLMs, decoupling input compression from output compression to measure comprehension and generation independently. TRON reduces tokens by up to 27% with accuracy within 14pp of the JSON baseline. TOON achieves up to 18% reduction at a similar 9pp accuracy cost, but additionally cascades on multi-turn parsing failures and collapses parallel tool-call output for most models.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [457] [One Mask to Rule Them All: On Hidden Facts after Editing and How to Find Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28839)
*Ali Holmov,Paul Youssef,Nandi Schoots,Christin Seifert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现ROME和MEMIT知识编辑方法虽修改不同事实，但都作用于相同的权重子集，通过训练二进制掩码可逆转80%以上的编辑效果，揭示了编辑通过抑制而非覆盖知识的机制，并解释了其无法传播至相关事实的原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法（如ROME、MEMIT）主要基于输出行为评估，其内部机制尚未得到充分探索，尤其是不同事实编辑是否依赖相同机制尚不明确。

Method: 在编辑后的权重上训练一个紧凑的二进制掩码，通过掩码逆转编辑效果来识别共享的功能结构；同时在编辑过程中注入掩码观察对编辑成功率的影响。

Result: 掩码可在训练集逆转80%编辑效果，测试集达70%以上；注入掩码导致编辑成功率从98%骤降至38%；掩码通过消除后层过度注意来逆转编辑。

Conclusion: 不同事实编辑共享共同的功能子空间；编辑机制是"抑制"而非"覆盖"知识，这解释了编辑无法传播至相关事实的原因；该发现可用于检测和防御不当编辑。

Abstract: Knowledge editing methods such as ROME and MEMIT update factual associations in transformer models by modifying MLP weights. While evaluated mainly by output behavior, their internal mechanism remains underexplored. We investigate whether edits rely on a common mechanism, regardless of which fact is modified. Despite fact-specific weight changes, we argue that ROME and MEMIT target the same subset of weights critical for maintaining edits. To isolate this subset, we train a compact binary mask over the edited weights. The mask reverses 80% of edits on the training set and over 70% on the test set, confirming that diverse edits share a common functional structure. Our analysis reveals that the mask reverses edits by eliminating overattention in later layers. Additionally, we show that injecting the mask during editing drops editing success from 98% to 38%, demonstrating that this mechanism is necessary for edits to succeed. Our finding that edits suppress rather than overwrite knowledge explains why ROME and MEMIT fail to propagate changes to related facts. The identified common functional subspace informs detection and defense against unwanted edits.

</details>


### [458] [Representation Signatures and Risk-Feedback Alignment in LLM Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28850)
*Weicheng Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用TradeArena测试平台，分析了LLM智能体在金融决策中的行为对齐与表征动态，发现计划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩等预失败信号，并验证了风险反馈作为外部对齐信号的有效性及其局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM智能体在金融决策环境中的行为对齐与表征动态，寻找可测量的预失败信号，并验证风险审计反馈能否作为对齐信号发挥作用。

Method: 基于TradeArena交易智能体测试平台，分析多种LLM轨迹中的规划嵌入漂移、融合计划-风险表征分离、有效秩收缩等指标；通过80个滚动失败锚点进行统计验证，并引入无思维链权重、词汇控制、OHLCV噪声、虚假审计报告等压力测试；最后进行51只股票的日内实验。

Result: 发现了可测量的预失败指标（规划嵌入漂移、有效秩收缩）；压力测试显示理性级收缩在无思维链时消失，但意图空间收缩仍存在；真实审计反馈能改善部分模型的校准与收益表现；51只股票实验发现LLM理性存在相关性盲点。

Conclusion: 可审计的风险反馈与表征轨迹能够揭示LLM金融推理何时对齐、漂移或失败，研究主张的是可诊断性而非盈利性。

Abstract: We study behavioral alignment and representation dynamics of large language model (LLM) agents in financial decision environments. Using TradeArena, an auditable trading-agent testbed with risk reports, execution simulation, memory, and replayable trajectories, we analyze how rationales, positions, and interventions evolve under market stress. We find measurable pre-failure signatures: planning embeddings drift from normal-state centroids, fused plan-risk representations separate normal from pre-drawdown states, and manifold diagnostics show effective-rank contraction before failures. To address small-sample and embedding-choice concerns, we use 80 rolling failure anchors across eight LLM trajectories and show that contraction persists across hash, LSA, Transformer, and white-box hidden-state probes. Stress tests with CoT-free target weights, lexical controls, OHLCV noise, and false-audit reports indicate that rationale-level contraction can vanish without rationales, while intent-space contraction may remain; lexical diversity does not collapse; and fused signatures remain informative under noise. We also find that structured risk feedback can act as an external alignment signal without fine-tuning, but not as a universal performance enhancer: true audit feedback improves calibration for some models, return and drawdown for others, and reveals cases where hidden or placebo feedback has higher short-horizon return but weaker alignment diagnostics. Finally, a 51-stock intraday experiment reveals a correlation blind spot: LLM rationales often justify concentrated exposure to coupled assets that the risk layer repeatedly clips, with a rolling Markowitz baseline as a covariance reference. These results support a research claim rather than a profitability claim: auditable risk feedback and representation trajectories reveal when LLM financial reasoning is aligning, drifting, or failing.

</details>


### [459] [OOD-GraphLLM: Graph Large Language Model for Out-of-Distribution Generalized Drug Synergy Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30247)
*Xin Wang,Linxin Xiao,Yang Yao,Wenwu Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OOD-GraphLLM，首次将图大语言模型用于药物协同预测中的分布外泛化问题，通过联合优化分子图表示与生物医学语义表示，并采用检索增强的指令微调策略，实现对新型化合物的准确预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有药物协同预测方法假设数据独立同分布，无法应对新型化合物导致的拓扑结构分布偏移（O.O.D.）问题。

Method: 提出OOD-GraphLLM框架，联合优化分子图表示和生物医学语义语言表示；微调DrugSyn-LLM生物医学大模型；采用检索增强的生物医学指令微调策略对齐分子拓扑信息与语义信息。

Result: 在O.O.D.设置下实现了药物协同效果的准确预测；公开了源代码和模型，提供交互式Web系统。

Conclusion: 首次将图大语言模型引入分布外泛化的药物协同预测任务，验证了联合分子结构信息与语义信息的有效性。

Abstract: Drug synergy prediction (DSP) aims to identify efficacious drug combinations under various cellular contexts with different targets. However, the continual emergence of novel compounds results in variations in molecular scaffolds and sizes, causing drug synergy data to exhibit out-of-distribution (O.O.D.) shifts with respect to topological structure. Existing works rely on in-distribution (I.D.) assumption, failing to handle the O.O.D. shifts. To solve this problem, we study out-of-distribution generalized drug synergy prediction through a graph large language model for the first time. Nevertheless, O.O.D. generalized DSP is highly non-trivial, posing several challenges: i) how to discover structurally relevant and irrelevant molecular representations with respect to cell targets; ii) how to find the optimal graph neural architectures that accurately calculate molecular representations; and iii) how to jointly leverage molecular structural and semantic information in LLMs. To address these challenges, we propose OOD-GraphLLM, a novel graphLLM framework which is able to accurately predict drug synergy under O.O.D. settings via jointly optimizing molecular graph representation and biomedical semantic language representations in a unified manner. Furthermore, we finetune DrugSyn-LLM, a biomedical LLM, and employ a retrieval-augmented biomedical instruction tuning strategy to align molecular topological information and molecular semantic information with language-based reasoning for O.O.D. generalized DSP. Both the source code (https://github.com/EkkoXiao/Bio-GraphLLM) and released model (https://mn.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/bio-graphllm/) are publicly available, where users are allowed to download model resources and interactively use the system through a web interface.

</details>


### [460] [Mechanistic origins of catastrophic forgetting: why RL preserves circuits better than SFT?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28860)
*Jeanmely Rojas Nunez,Viraj Sawant,Nathan Allen,Nomgondalai Amgalanbaatar,Yannis Zongo,Vasu Sharma,Maheep Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"差异电路脆弱性"指标，从机制层面比较RL和SFT对LLM内部计算电路的破坏程度，发现SFT适应更快但电路破坏更严重，RL保留更多原始电路但适应较慢。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究从行为层面发现RL比SFT更能缓解灾难性遗忘，但尚不清楚这种优势是否在模型内部计算电路的保存程度上有所体现。本文旨在从机制层面解释RL为何更鲁棒于灾难性遗忘。

Method: 提出"差异电路脆弱性"（differential circuit vulnerability）指标，以注意力头为单位衡量微调对电路造成的退化程度，并在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上对比RL和SFT在科学问答任务中的表现。

Result: SFT在目标任务上适应更快，但对内部电路造成显著更大的破坏，且伴随更严重的先前能力遗忘；RL保留了更大比例的原始电路，但任务适应速度较慢。存在明确的机制性权衡。

Conclusion: 电路的保存程度可能是RL相比SFT更鲁棒于灾难性遗忘的内在机制原因。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) frequently induces catastrophic forgetting of prior capabilities. Recent work has shown that reinforcement learning (RL) retains prior capabilities more effectively than supervised fine-tuning (SFT), attributing this to policy-gradient updates remaining closer to the base policy \cite{shenfeld2025rl}. We extend this behavioral account to the mechanistic level and ask whether RL's advantage is mirrored by stronger preservation of internal computational circuits. We introduce differential circuit vulnerability, a head-level measure of how much a circuit degrades under fine-tuning, and use it to compare RL and SFT on Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct adapted to scientific question-answering. We find a clear mechanistic trade-off: SFT adapts more rapidly to the target task but produces substantially greater circuit disruption and forgetting of prior capabilities, whereas RL preserves a larger fraction of the base circuit at the cost of slower task adaptation. These findings suggest that circuit preservation may help explain why RL is more robust to catastrophic forgetting. We released our code here: https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability.

</details>


### [461] [Molecular Lead Optimization via Agentic Tool Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28862)
*Lingxiao Li,Haobo Zhang,Ruohao Fan,Bin Chen,Jiayu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TRACE，一个基于LLM推理的轨迹感知智能体，将分子先导优化中的工具选择建模为序列决策问题，在保持分子相似性的同时显著提升ADMET性质优化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子优化方法多为单步优化，忽略了序列设计决策的长期影响，无法有效应对先导优化中需要逐步结构精炼的复杂需求。

Method: TRACE采用轨迹感知的序列决策框架，结合LLM推理能力，在优化约束下对分子优化工具进行前瞻性选择，实现多步递进式结构优化。

Result: 在多个ADMET优化任务上，TRACE在优化成功率、性质改善幅度和分子有效性方面均优于基线模型，同时保持了较高的分子相似性。

Conclusion: 将分子优化建模为轨迹感知的序列决策问题，结合LLM推理，能有效提升先导优化的整体效果和可靠性。

Abstract: Drug discovery is a lengthy and resource-intensive process composed of multiple stages. Among these stages, lead optimization plays a critical role in transforming early hit compounds into viable drug candidates. This stage requires improving ADMET-related properties through subtle structural refinement while preserving key molecular substructures responsible for binding affinity to disease targets. Recent advances in artificial intelligence have shown promise in accelerating various aspects of drug discovery; however, most existing approaches to lead optimization rely on one-step molecular optimization, which fail to account for the long-term consequences of sequential design decisions. To address this limitation, we propose TRACE, a trajectory-aware, LLM-reasoning agent for molecular lead optimization that formulates tool selection as a sequential decision-making problem over action trajectories. Given a lead molecule and an optimization objective, TRACE makes trajectory-aware decisions over molecular optimization tools, enabling forward-looking refinement under structural constraints. Experiments on multiple ADMET optimization tasks show that our agent achieves higher optimization success, larger property improvements, and higher validity, while preserving molecular similarity compared to baseline models.

</details>


### [462] [Self-Play Reinforcement Learning under Imperfect Information in Big 2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28863)
*Aalok Patwa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了不完美信息多人卡牌游戏Big 2中的深度强化学习，发现PPO算法优于多种Q学习方法，且适度熵正则化和当前策略自对弈能显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不完美信息多人博弈具有隐藏信息、稀疏奖励和非平稳对手等挑战，现有研究缺乏可控的比较框架。Big 2作为四人不完美信息卡牌游戏，为研究这些挑战提供了良好的实验平台。

Method: 开发了一个自对弈RL框架，在统一环境、输入表征、训练预算和评估协议下，系统比较了策略梯度（PPO）与多种值近似方法（蒙特卡洛Q近似、SARSA、Q-learning）的性能，并探究了熵正则化和不同自对弈策略的影响。

Result: PPO在对抗随机、贪心和启发式对手时均优于其他方法；适度熵正则化可防止策略过度确定化从而提升性能；当前策略自对弈比检查点自对弈或固定对手训练提供了更强的有限预算课程。

Conclusion: Big 2是研究不完美信息、多人交互、延迟奖励和可变动作集下深度强化学习的有用受控实验环境。

Abstract: Imperfect-information multiplayer games test whether agents can act under hidden information, sparse rewards, and non-stationary opponents. We study these challenges in Big 2, a four-player imperfect-information card game. We develop a self-play RL framework for Big 2 that enables controlled comparisons between policy-gradient and value-approximating agents. Under a common environment, input representation, training budget, and evaluation protocol, PPO outperforms Monte Carlo Q approximation, SARSA, and Q-learning against random, greedy, and heuristic Big 2 opponents. We further find that moderate entropy regularization improves PPO by preventing the policy from becoming overly deterministic, and that current-policy self-play provides a stronger finite-budget curriculum than checkpoint self-play or fixed-opponent training. Together, these results show that Big 2 is a useful controlled setting for studying deep RL under imperfect information, multiplayer interaction, delayed rewards, and variable action sets.

</details>


### [463] [Emergent Semantic Representations in World Models through Physical Interaction without Linguistic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28865)
*Jiayi Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，基于VAE的世界模型在无语言监督的物理探索中，其潜在空间会自发形成与物理几何结构对齐的空间语义结构。预测性能与语义对齐共同提升（Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004），且KL正则化（beta=0.1）会同时破坏两者，而降低beta至0.001则可恢复，表明物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的组织原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究世界模型在无语言监督的物理探索中，其表征空间的组织原则是什么。作者认为答案是由物理世界的几何结构单一原则所主导。

Method: 训练基于VAE的世界模型进行随机具身探索，分析潜在空间的结构。通过方向准确率（0.677 vs 0.547）和位置RSA（0.192 vs 0.029，提升6.6倍）评估几何对齐。进行双重实验：正常训练（beta=0.1）导致几何结构和预测能力同时崩溃；降低beta至0.001可恢复两者。

Result: 方向准确率0.677±0.029（随机编码器0.547），位置RSA 0.192±0.047（随机编码器0.029，提升6.6倍）。预测性能与语义对齐共同提升（Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004）。标准KL正则化（beta=0.1）使两者同时崩溃至接近随机水平，降低beta至0.001则同时恢复。

Conclusion: 物理世界几何结构是世界模型表征的组织原则，这一发现对设计具身智能体的语义表征具有直接启示意义。

Abstract: What does a world model learn from physical exploration, without any linguistic supervision? We argue the answer is organized by a single principle: the geometric structure of the physical world. Training a VAE-based world model on random embodied exploration, we find that its latent space develops spatial semantic structure that mirrors physical geometry -- direction accuracy 0.677+-0.029 versus 0.547 for a randomly initialized encoder, and position RSA 0.192+-0.047 versus 0.029 for random encoders (6.6x improvement), showing that training induces genuine structural organization beyond CNN inductive bias. Across 20 temporal checkpoints, prediction performance and semantic alignment co-improve (Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004), consistent with the shared-driver account. We confirm this through a double knockout: standard KL regularization (beta=0.1) forces the encoder away from geometric structure, and both prediction performance and semantic alignment collapse simultaneously to near-chance by step 50,000 -- exactly as the shared-driver account predicts. Reducing beta to 0.001 restores geometric access and recovers both capabilities together. These findings establish physical world geometry as the organizing principle of world model representations, with direct implications for the design of semantically grounded embodied agents.

</details>


### [464] [Continuity and Ordinality Matter: Constraining Time Series Tokens for Effective Time Series Analysis with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28866)
*Musheng Li,Ziying Zhang,Cheng jin,Yuantao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COM策略，通过在初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，保留时间序列令牌的连续性和有序性，从而提升基于令牌的时间序列大语言模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于令牌的时间序列大语言模型忽略了时间序列令牌固有的连续性和有序性，这严重限制了模型的表现。

Method: 提出COM（Continuity and Ordinality Matter）策略，在令牌嵌入的初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，以保留时间序列的连续性和有序性。

Result: 在多个时间序列分析基准上，COM一致提升了基于令牌的TS-LLM性能，取得了有竞争力的结果和强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 保留时间序列令牌的连续性和有序性对于基于令牌的TS-LLM的有效性至关重要，COM策略是一种有效的改进方案。

Abstract: Token-based time series large language models (TS-LLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for time series analysis and reasoning. However, prior studies largely overlook the inherent continuity and ordinality of time series tokens, which substantially limits model performance. In this paper, we argue that preserving these properties in time series token embeddings is crucial for the effectiveness of token-based TS-LLMs. To this end, we propose COM (Continuity and Ordinality Matter), a continuity- and ordinality-aware strategy that integrates geometric constraints into both the initialization and training stages. Empirical results on multiple time series analysis benchmarks demonstrate that COM consistently improves the performance of token-based TS-LLMs, achieving competitive results and strong generalizability. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COM .

</details>


### [465] [PrismFlow: Residual Dynamics for Flow Matching in Time-Series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28867)
*Junru Zhang,Lang Feng,Jinbo Wang,Xu Guo,Yucheng Wang,Han Yu,Min Wu,Yabo Dong,Duanqing Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PrismFlow通过Koopman启发的动态专家和置信度感知的WTA目标，解决了流匹配(Flow Matching)在多模态、多尺度时间序列生成中的频谱收缩和模式覆盖问题，取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准流匹配使用单一全局向量场估计器处理多模态、多尺度时间序列时，不同动态模式经过相近流状态时需不相容的条件速度，导致估计器学习到过度平滑的近似，产生频谱畸变和模式覆盖差的问题。

Method: 提出PrismFlow：1) Koopman启发的动态专家，在潜空间中学习残差修正，将局部非线性时间演化近似为线性变换；2) 置信度感知的WTA目标，仅更新与样本最对齐的专家，促进模式特异性专业化；3) 采样时，所选专家为全局传输场添加残差动态修正。

Result: 在多个基准上，Context-FID提升15.6%，Discriminative Score提升38.6%，在低数据场景下保持鲁棒，且有效用于预测和插补任务。

Conclusion: PrismFlow有效缓解了标准流匹配中的频谱收缩问题，在不牺牲稳定性的前提下恢复了细粒度、高频率的时间结构，实现了时间序列生成的最优性能。

Abstract: Generating high-quality time-series data is challenging because real-world signals often exhibit multimodal patterns and multiscale dynamics, including oscillations and high-frequency variations. Flow Matching (FM) offers an efficient alternative to diffusion models, but practical implementations typically rely on a single finite-capacity global vector-field estimator. In such heterogeneous temporal distributions, distinct regimes may pass through nearby flow states while requiring incompatible conditional velocities. A monolithic estimator trained with the standard $\ell_2$ velocity-matching objective may therefore learn an overly smoothed approximation of the local transport field. This estimator-level smoothing can attenuate branch-specific dynamics, leading to spectral distortion and poor mode coverage. To address this, we propose PrismFlow, a new FM method with Koopman-inspired dynamical experts. Each expert learns residual corrections in a latent space where local nonlinear temporal evolution can be approximated by linear transitions. We further propose a confidence-aware Winner-Take-All (WTA) objective that updates only the expert best aligned with each sample while masking gradients to the others, encouraging mode-specific specialization. During sampling, the selected expert adds a residual dynamical correction to the global transport field, preserving FM stability while recovering fine-grained and high-frequency temporal structures. Across various benchmarks, PrismFlow effectively mitigates the spectral contraction in standard FM and achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a 15.6% gain in Context-FID and a 38.6% improvement in Discriminative Score, while remaining robust in low-data settings and effective for forecasting and imputation.

</details>


### [466] [Evolving Features vs Evolving Entire Trees with GP for Interpretable Survival Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30119)
*Thalea Schlender,Peter A. N. Bosman,Tanja Alderliesten*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用遗传编程多目标进化可解释特征集，并联合优化生存树结构与非线性分裂逻辑，以构建既准确又可解释的浅层生存树。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的生存树虽然易于解释，但为了捕捉复杂关系往往需要生长得很大，威胁可解释性；且贪心算法构建的树可能忽略全局最优分裂组合，限制预测性能。因此需要一种既能保持可解释性又能提升预测性能的方法。

Method: 使用遗传编程多目标进化可解释特征集；引入联合进化方法，同时优化生存树结构和非线性分裂逻辑；在不同树归纳策略下进行比较研究。

Result: 进化特征构建在不同树归纳策略和不同树深度下均提升了预测性能；完全联合进化在生成多个可解释且性能良好的浅层生存树方面具有最高潜力。

Conclusion: 进化方法（特别是联合进化）能有效构建既浅层（可解释）又具有竞争力的生存树，平衡了准确性与可解释性之间的矛盾。

Abstract: Survival analysis concerns the task of predicting the time until an event occurs. Often used in the medical field, survival analysis deals with incomplete (i.e., censored) data, for instance, from patients who did not experience the event during the duration of the study. For practical use, both accuracy and interpretability are important.
  Survival trees are easy-to-follow survival models that split the patient cohort recursively into discrete patient groups. Whilst survival trees can capture complex relationships, they typically need to grow large, threatening interpretability. Moreover, survival trees are often built using greedy approaches that may overlook globally optimal split combinations, limiting predictive performance.
  Shallow survival trees require expressive, higher-order feature combinations to achieve competitive accuracy. We therefore use genetic programming to multi-objectively evolve inherently inspectable feature sets and study how they interact with different tree induction strategies. We further introduce an evolutionary approach that jointly optimises the survival tree structure and the non-linear split logic.
  Our findings demonstrate that evolutionary feature construction improves predictive performance across different tree induction strategies on two real-world datasets and two different survival tree depths. Full joint evolution has the overall highest potential to propose multiple inherently inspectable shallow survival trees of good performance.

</details>


### [467] [TaxDistill: Improving Metagenomic Taxonomic Annotation via Distilled Genomic Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28868)
*Rongye Ye,Lun Li,Zheng Luo,Yiran Zhan,Shuhui Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TaxDistill，一种基于知识蒸馏的宏基因组分类框架。使用500M参数的基因组基础模型GenomeOcean作为教师网络生成软标签，通过蒸馏将知识传递给学生网络，有效减少初始检索工具引入的标签噪声。在CAMI2数据集上表现优异，例如将MMseqs2的F1分数从0.763提升至0.941。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统宏基因组分类方法依赖序列相似性搜索，但受限于微生物多样性和参考数据库不完整。基于学习的方法如Taxometer虽进行后验校正，但其训练依赖相似性搜索工具生成的标签，不可避免地引入噪声，损害表示学习和分类性能。

Method: 提出TaxDistill知识蒸馏框架：1) 引入500M参数的GenomeOcean基因组基础模型作为教师网络，提取深度语义特征并基于置信度生成软标签；2) 将软标签信息蒸馏到轻量级学生网络中，降低初始检索工具引入的标签噪声。

Result: 在七个CAMI2数据集上的综合实验表明，TaxDistill在多数场景下优于现有基线。例如在Gastrointestinal数据集上，将MMseqs2的F1分数从0.763提升至0.941，超过Taxometer基线。

Conclusion: TaxDistill提供了一种可靠的方法用于复杂宏基因组分析中的标签校正，通过知识蒸馏有效缓解了标签噪声问题。

Abstract: Metagenomic taxonomic annotation aims to identify the microbial origins of DNA fragments in environmental samples. Traditional methods that rely on sequence similarity are often constrained by the high microbial diversity and the incompleteness of reference databases, which has motivated the development of learning approaches such as Taxometer that perform post hoc correction to learn more informative metagenomic sequence representations. However, these methods typically rely on labels derived from similarity search tools during training, which inevitably introduces noise that can impair representation learning and degrade classification performance. To address this issue, we propose TaxDistill, a knowledge distillation framework for metagenomic classification. We introduce GenomeOcean, a 500M parameter genomic foundation model, as the teacher network to extract deep semantic features and generate soft labels based on confidence. By distilling this soft label information into a lightweight student network, TaxDistill effectively reduces the label noise introduced by initial retrieval tools. Comprehensive experiments on seven diverse CAMI2 datasets demonstrate that TaxDistill outperforms existing baselines in most scenarios. For instance, on the Gastrointestinal dataset, it improves the F1 score of MMseqs2 from 0.763 to 0.941, outperforming the Taxometer baseline. Overall, TaxDistill provides a reliable method for label correction in complex metagenomic analysis.

</details>


### [468] [Balancing Multimodal Learning through Label Space Reshaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28869)
*Xiaoyu Ma,Weijie Zhang,Yuanhao Gao,Han Miao,Yongjian Deng,Hao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对多模态学习中模态不平衡问题，提出首个从标签侧设计的平衡多模态标签重塑方法（BMLR），通过均衡各模态到共享标签空间的映射难度来提升多模态性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要通过强化弱模态或调整梯度来缓解模态不平衡，但未从模态层面分析学习速度差异的根本原因，且往往以牺牲强模态的优化能力为代价。

Method: 提出Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR)，通过重塑跨模态标签空间来均衡不同模态的映射难度，从而促进模态交互并注入更丰富的类间信息。

Result: 在多种架构上广泛实验表明，BMLR consistently提升多模态性能，且与多种模型设计具有强兼容性。

Conclusion: 本文从标签侧出发解决了模态不平衡问题，为多模态学习提供了新视角，所提方法有效且兼容性强。

Abstract: Multimodal learning often suffers from modality imbalance, where modalities that converge faster dominate optimization while others remain undertrained. Existing approaches typically mitigate this issue by strengthening the weak modality or adjusting optimization gradients. However, such strategies mainly compensate for optimization rate discrepancies, often at the expense of the strong modality's optimization capacity, without analyzing how these discrepancies arise at the modality level. Based on theoretical insights and empirical observations, we argue that the discrepancy of learning pace arises from differences in the mapping difficulty between modality-specific feature space and the shared label space. To address this issue, we propose Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR), the first method that promotes multimodal balance from the label-side design. BMLR reshapes the cross-modal label space to equalize mapping difficulty across modalities, thereby facilitating modality interaction and injecting richer inter-class information into each modality. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures demonstrate that BMLR consistently improves multimodal performance and exhibits strong compatibility with diverse model designs. The source code will be released soon.

</details>


### [469] [Representation Alignment Rests on Linear Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28870)
*Kiril Bangachev,Guy Bresler,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过信号、偏差和噪声三元统计框架研究柏拉图表示假说（PRH），提出柏拉图对齐源于物体与属性间的普适关系（线性表示假说LRH），发现稀疏自编码器提取的线性特征可增强跨模态对齐；中心化和归一化可缓解模型偏差；数据稀缺导致表示噪声，词频与对齐度正相关。最终提出统计模型 refined LRH 以解释现代AI架构中的表示对齐现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在理解不同AI模型间表示对齐（Platonic Representation Hypothesis）的内在机制，探究为何不同架构和训练方式的模型会收敛到相似的表示空间。

Method: 提出信号-偏差-噪声三元统计框架：信号部分利用稀疏自编码器提取线性物体-属性特征验证LRH对PRH的解释力；偏差部分使用中心化和归一化处理；噪声部分通过分析词频与对齐度的相关性揭示数据稀疏性的影响。

Result: 1) 稀疏自编码器提取的线性特征比密集特征展现更强的跨模态对齐；2) 中心化和归一化可提升跨模型对齐一致性；3) 词频与对齐度呈显著正相关，说明数据稀疏性驱动表示噪声。综合提出 refined LRH 统计模型。

Conclusion: 表示对齐可归因于三个因素：普适的线性对象-属性关系（信号）、可缓解的架构偏差（偏差）、由数据稀缺引起的噪声（噪声）；提出的统计模型为理解现代AI架构中的表示收敛现象提供了统一解释框架。

Abstract: We investigate the Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH) through a tripartite statistical framework of representations: signal, bias, and noise. {1) Signal:} We propose that Platonic alignment arises from the universal relationship between objects and attributes, which is encoded linearly in representations according to the Linear Representation Hypothesis (LRH). We provide evidence that LRH helps explain PRH by extracting linear object-attribute features with sparse autoencoders and showing that these sparse representations often exhibit stronger cross-modal alignment than their dense counterparts. {2) Bias:} Models have different implicit biases due to the diverse architectures and training procedures used. We show that this difference can be partially mitigated. Centering and normalization consistently improve cross-model alignment. {3) Noise:} Finite-sample training leads to noise in representations. We provide evidence that representational noise is driven by data scarcity by revealing a strong and consistent positive correlation between word frequency and alignment in LLMs and text embedding models. Synthesizing signal, bias, and noise, we propose a statistical model that refines the Linear Representation Hypothesis and explains further phenomena related to the alignment of representations emerging from diverse modern AI architectures.

</details>


### [470] [Pre-Registering the Detectable Effect: A Paired-MDE Budget for 4-bit Quantization Benchmarks, with a Pilot Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28873)
*Zexin Zhuang,Yanhang Li,Zhichao Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对量化基准测试中的可靠性问题，提出了一种基于配对二项式样本量计算的保守最小可检测效应（MDE）界，帮助基准设计者在运行前评估量化声明的可信度。实验表明，大部分方差源于二项式抽样噪声，且提示模板方差可能超过量化效应本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化基准测试中，由于样本量小、方差来源复杂，研究者难以判断观察到的量化性能差异是真实信号还是随机噪声。现有方法缺乏一个简洁、保守的统计界限来指导实验设计和结果解读。

Method: 将Miettinen（1968）的配对二项式样本量计算方法适配到量化基准测试，推导出MDE界 δ* ≤ (z_{1-α/2}+z_{1-β})√(ρ_d/m)，其中m为配对项目数，ρ_d为FP16-NF4不一致率。在4个模型、4个基准测试（k=5折，n=100）上进行了验证实验，并增加了MMLU提示模板变体研究。

Result: 假设ρ_d=0.10时，所有NF4-FP16的观测差值均低于MDE；大多数交叉折SD在±1.5个百分点内，接近二项式参考值√(p(1-p)/n)。唯一临界案例（OPT-WinoGrande, |Δ|=3.2 pp）在ρ_d=0.10时低于MDE，但在ρ_d=0.05时高于MDE。MMLU上提示模板范围（2-10 pp）达到或超过最大量化差值（3.2 pp）。

Conclusion: 该MDE界提供了一个简洁的预实验预算工具，使基准设计者能明确量化声明的可靠性。提示模板方差是量化评估中不可忽视的噪声源，必须先固定提示模板再进行量化审计。论文还提供了一个五行的预注册模板。

Abstract: This is a planning-method note with an unpaired pilot audit. We adapt the classical paired-binary sample-size calculation (Miettinen, 1968) to quantization benchmarks, giving a conservative minimum detectable effect (MDE) bound $δ^{*} \le (z_{1-α/2}+z_{1-β})\sqrt{ρ_d/m}$ in the paired item count $m$ and the FP16-NF4 disagreement rate $ρ_d$. The bound turns "how reliable is my quantization claim?" into a one-line budget a benchmark designer can commit to before running. We illustrate the bound on four models and four benchmarks ($k=5$ splits of $n=100$), and add a parallel MMLU prompt-template study to put the bound's quantization-noise scale alongside the prompt-noise scale. Assuming $ρ_d=0.10$ (an unmeasured planning value), all observed NF4-FP16 deltas fall below the implied MDE, and most cross-split SDs lie within $\pm 1.5$ pp of the binomial reference $\sqrt{p(1-p)/n}$, so much of the variance reported as "benchmark unreliability" on $n=100$ subsamples is binomial sampling noise. The single borderline cell (OPT-WinoGrande, $|Δ|=3.2$ pp) is below the implied MDE at $ρ_d=0.10$ but above it at $ρ_d=0.05$, illustrating the planning trade-off the bound makes explicit. On MMLU, prompt-template ranges of 2-10 pp meet or exceed the largest observed quantization delta (3.2 pp), so a quantization audit that does not first fix the prompt template absorbs template variance into its noise floor. We complement the bound with a five-line pre-registration template.

</details>


### [471] [Towards Continuous-time Causal Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28880)
*Dennis Thumm,Ruben Wiedemann,Ying Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将离散时间因果先验数据拟合网络扩展到连续时间的精确连续性准则（轨迹律对观测时间表的不变性），构建了三层分类体系（离散、朴素观测网格积分、细粒度解耦观测积分），并通过随机DAG上的OU/小MLP非线性漂移实现顶层。2×2消融实验显示细粒度积分在8/8个单元上优于朴素积分，且评估网格越精细差距越大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散时间因果先验网络扩展到连续时间时，若SDE在每个观测间隔仅积分一次，轨迹律会依赖观测时间表，导致先验实际上仍是离散时间马尔可夫模型。需要建立精确的连续性准则来保证模型对观测时间表的不变性。

Method: 提出轨迹律对观测时间表不变的连续性准则，建立三层分类法（离散、朴素观测网格积分、细网格解耦观测积分），在随机DAG上使用OU过程或小MLP非线性漂移实现顶层，支持不规则观测计划和多种干预类型。

Result: 2×2（编码器×积分器）消融实验在8/8个单元上显示细网格积分优于朴素积分（符号一致性p<1/256），且评估网格越精细差距越大；编码器维度在细积分时无效，但在朴素积分时需时间感知编码。

Conclusion: 细网格积分策略有效实现了连续时间因果先验的观测时间表不变性，在药代动力学和物理系统数据上发布了初步的零样本协议。

Abstract: Extending discrete-time causal Prior-data Fitted Networks for time series to continuous time invites writing the mechanism as a stochastic differential equation (SDE) -- but if the SDE is integrated \emph{once per observation gap}, the trajectory law depends on when it is observed, and the prior remains a discrete-time Markov model in SDE clothing.
  We propose a precise continuity criterion -- trajectory-law invariance to the observation schedule -- together with a three-tier taxonomy (discrete; naive observation-grid integration; fine-grid integration with decoupled observation) and a construction realising the top tier on a random DAG with OU or small-MLP nonlinear drifts, irregular observation schedules, and hard / soft / time-varying interventions.
  A $2 \times 2$ encoder $\times$ integrator ablation, run independently on a linear and a nonlinear prior, finds fine-grid integration beats naive on 8/8 cells (sign-consistency $p < 1/256$) with the gap growing as the eval grid refines; the encoder axis is null with fine integration but time-aware-leading with naive.
  We release the prior and a preliminary zero-shot protocol on pharmacokinetic and physical-system data.

</details>


### [472] [When LLM Reward Design Fails: Diagnostic-Driven Refinement for Sparse Structured RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28918)
*Youting Wang,Yuan Tang,Bowen Liu,Xuan Liu,Dingyan Shang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对稀疏、结构化强化学习任务，提出将LLM生成的奖励塑形视为调试过程而非一次生成。通过诊断驱动的迭代精炼，在MiniGrid任务上取得了显著提升（DoorKey-8x8从2.3%到97.6%，KeyCorridor从31.2%到86.7%），揭示了奖励泛滥和语义误解两种主要失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成的奖励函数往往存在缺陷，一次性生成效果不佳。本文认为应将其视为调试过程，通过诊断反馈迭代改进，而非期望一次生成成功。

Method: 提出诊断驱动的迭代精炼方法：利用训练诊断指标和失败模式分类法来指导针对性的奖励函数修订。采用PPO算法，在MiniGrid（核心评估）和MuJoCo（边界压力测试）上进行实验。

Result: DoorKey-8x8从2.3%提升至97.6%，KeyCorridor从31.2%提升至86.7%。静态词汇表对照恢复了大部分差距（87.6%；70.7%），说明分类法提示是主要机制。连续控制任务中回报趋势反馈移除了一个假阳性机制但未带来稳健提升。

Conclusion: 该方法适用于具有可靠接口的稀疏结构化任务和PPO算法。调试视角比一次性生成更有效，但存在校准极限。在密集奖励的连续控制任务中表现有限，event_text的影响可能是有益、有害或中性的。

Abstract: For sparse, structured reinforcement-learning tasks with semantic reward-function interfaces, LLM-generated reward shaping is better framed as debugging than one-shot generation. We study PPO-trained agents using MiniGrid as core evaluation and MuJoCo as boundary stress test. Our audit finds two dominant one-shot failure modes -- reward flooding and semantic/API misunderstanding -- plus a rarer weak-shaping case. We propose diagnostic-driven iterative refinement, where training diagnostics and a failure-mode taxonomy guide targeted reward-function revision. Refinement improves DoorKey-8x8 from 2.3% to 97.6% and KeyCorridor from 31.2% to 86.7% with high seed-to-seed variance. Controls show these gains are not from retrying or extra training: metrics-only re-prompting yields large drops, while a static-vocabulary control recovers much of the gap (87.6%; 70.7%), showing the taxonomy prompt is a major mechanism and dynamic labels provide only partially isolated incremental evidence. Budget-matched and Best-of-3 comparisons separate refinement from selection and training-time effects. Component-removal tests, sensitivity analyses, and an audit against author labels provide converging evidence for the debugging interpretation while revealing calibration limits. Continuous-control results show the boundary: success-based diagnostics can misfire in dense-reward locomotion, and return-trend feedback removes one false-positive mechanism without robust gains. The low-call protocol is a cost contrast with population-based reward search, not a benchmark comparison. In four crossed-variance-design environments, point estimates suggest larger gains when LLM reward-function variance dominates but bootstrap intervals are wide. The method is bounded to sparse structured tasks with reliable interfaces under PPO; fields like event_text may help, hurt, or be neutral.

</details>


### [473] [Context Distillation as Latent Memory Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28889)
*Ziyang Zheng,Zeju Li,Xiangyu Wen,Jianyuan Zhong,Junhua Huang,Lei Chen,Mingxuan Yuan,Qiang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出模块化LoRA记忆库框架，通过检索-路由-自门控机制管理上下文蒸馏中的潜记忆，并引入缓存共享提升推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文蒸馏方法忽略多潜记忆的存储、检索和非Oracle场景下的安全激活问题。

Method: 将每个上下文蒸馏为独立LoRA适配器形成记忆库，通过检索候选记忆、路由查询到合适适配器、Self-Gating决定是否激活潜记忆，并引入缓存共享降低管理开销。

Result: 在检索场景下显著优于基线方法，Self-Gating通过停用不必要的潜记忆提升鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 将上下文蒸馏建模为潜记忆管理问题，模块化记忆库+选择性激活机制是有效且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Context distillation compresses contextual information into model parameters, yet existing methods often ignore how multiple distilled latent memories should be stored, retrieved, and safely activated in non-oracle settings. We formulate context distillation as a latent memory management problem. We distill each context into an independent LoRA adapter, forming a modular memory bank that enables explicit memory selection. Given a query, our framework retrieves candidate memories, routes the query to the most suitable adapter, and uses a Self-Gating mechanism to decide whether latent memory should be activated. To improve efficiency, we further introduce cache sharing to reduce management overhead during inference. Experiments show that our method substantially outperforms baselines with retrieval, while Self-Gating improves robustness by deactivate unnecessary latent memories.

</details>


### [474] [Feature Geometry of LoRA Adapters: A Sparse Autoencoder Analysis of Representational Divergence in Fine-Tuned Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28896)
*Prasanth K K*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分析LoRA微调对语言模型表示几何结构的影响，发现LoRA诱导的特征与预训练SAE特征之间存在较弱几何对齐，表明LoRA更新占据残差流中部分独特的表示结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA微调虽被广泛使用，但其内部表示变化尚未被充分理解，需要更深入的可解释性分析。

Method: 提出delta激活框架隔离适配器贡献，在Gemma-2-9B上对秩4/8/16/32的LoRA训练适配器特定SAE，使用余弦相似度、主角分析和CKA评估特征空间对齐。

Result: LoRA特征字典与预训练SAE特征间几何对齐较弱；适配器特定SAE能更有效重建delta激活；特征密度随秩和深度增加，但几何分歧保持稳定。

Conclusion: LoRA微调会诱导预训练可解释性字典无法完全捕捉的特征结构，对机械可解释性、适应分析和安全审计有重要意义。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as a widely adopted approach for adapting large language models, yet the internal representational changes induced by LoRA fine-tuning remain insufficiently understood. In this work, we investigate the geometry of LoRA-induced representations using Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs). We introduce a delta activation framework that isolates the adapter-specific contribution to the residual stream.
  Using Gemma-2-9B with LoRA ranks 4, 8, 16, and 32, we train adapter-specific SAEs across multiple transformer layers and compare their learned feature spaces with pretrained SAE dictionaries. We evaluate representational alignment using cosine similarity between decoder directions, principal-angle analysis of feature subspaces, and Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) between activation representations.
  Across layers and ranks, we consistently observe comparatively weak geometric alignment between LoRA-induced feature dictionaries and pretrained SAE features. Adapter-specific SAEs also reconstruct delta activations more effectively than pretrained SAEs, suggesting that LoRA updates occupy partially distinct representational structure within the residual stream. Additionally, feature density increases with rank and depth, while geometric divergence remains relatively stable across ranks.
  These findings provide empirical evidence that LoRA fine-tuning can induce feature structures that are not fully captured by pretrained interpretability dictionaries, with implications for mechanistic interpretability, adaptation analysis, and safety auditing of fine-tuned language models.

</details>


### [475] [PROTOCOL: Late Interaction Retrieval for Protein Homolog Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29158)
*Gabrielle Cohn,Rohan Gumaste,Minh Hoang,Vihan Lakshman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProtoCol利用ColBERT风格的晚期交互机制，通过残基级嵌入比较替代传统向量池化，显著提升了蛋白质远程同源检索的灵敏度，在SCOPe和Pfam基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列比对方法和基于蛋白质语言模型（PLM）的向量池化检索因全局相似性弱或丢失局部特征，难以处理"twilight zone"下的远程同源检测问题。

Method: 将蛋白质表示为残基嵌入集合，采用ColBERT式晚期交互（Late Interaction），通过MaxSim计算查询与候选蛋白间残基级最大相似度并进行排序。

Result: 在SCOPe超家族和Pfam clan基准上，ProtoCol超越序列组成、比对方法、池化PLM及训练后的单向量基线。

Conclusion: 残基级晚期交互是一种有效的远程同源检索范式，兼顾表示预计算效率与局部比对敏感性。

Abstract: Protein homology search underlies function annotation, structure prediction, and evolutionary analysis, but remains challenging in the "twilight zone," where global sequence similarity is weak and classical alignment methods lose sensitivity. Protein language models provide context-aware representations that could improve alignment sensitivity in this regime. However, prior protein embedding-based retrieval pipelines often pool these representations into a single vector, potentially obscuring local motifs, domains, or conserved residues that reveal remote homology. We introduce ProtoCol, a model which represents proteins as sets of residue embeddings and uses ColBERT-style late interaction to test whether residue-level comparison improves homolog retrieval. ProtoCol encodes proteins independently, keeps candidate representations pre-computable, and scores candidates with MaxSim over residue embeddings. On SCOPe superfamily and Pfam clan benchmarks, ProtoCol outperforms sequence-composition, alignment-based, pooled PLM, and trained single-vector baselines, supporting late interaction as an effective retrieval layer for remote homology search.

</details>


### [476] [Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28900)
*Gabriel Moreira,Manuel Marques,João Paulo Costeira,Chenyan Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Spectral Guidance 框架，利用生成过程的固有几何结构控制扩散模型，通过自监督学习条件期望算子的奇异函数，实现无需重训练或反向传播的稳定、高保真控制，在 CIFAR-10 上提升 37 个百分点条件准确率且采样加速 4 倍，并揭示了引导的最佳时间窗口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型的现有控制方法依赖重训练或采样时对去噪器进行反向传播，计算成本高且不稳定。作者希望利用生成过程的固有几何结构，找到少量信息丰富的特征来实现高效、稳定的引导。

Method: 1) 将扩散过程中的控制信号投影到条件期望算子的奇异函数所张成的子空间上；2) 通过自监督目标学习这些奇异函数；3) 将任意引导信号（标签、CLIP嵌入、掩码等）投影到采样轨迹上，无需重训练或反向传播。

Result: CIFAR-10上条件准确率比最强的无训练基线提升37个百分点，同时采样速度提升4倍。同一套表示同时支持标签、CLIP和空间（掩码）引导，无需辅助模型。揭示了生成过程中的相变现象，定位了有效引导的最佳时间窗口。

Conclusion: Spectral Guidance 提供了一种无需重训练、高效且稳定的扩散模型控制框架，通过几何视角揭示了引导的内在机制和最佳时机，具有广泛的适用性。

Abstract: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.

</details>


### [477] [Sequential Physics-Constrained Neural Operator Forward Modeling for the $\textit{Norne}$ Reservoir System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28909)
*Clement Etienam,Juntao Yang,Oleg Ovcharenko,Nick Luiken,Tsubasa Onishi,Nefeli Moridis,Issam Said*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文构建了基于神经算子的三相黑油储层序贯代理模型理论框架，重点研究傅里叶神经算子(FNO)及其物理信息变体(PINO)。以Norne基准油藏(46×112×22网格, 113,344个单元, 30个时间步, 3298天)为应用场景，围绕四个互相关联的理论问题展开：函数分析公式化、协变量偏移量化、物理约束谱稳定性、K步TBPTT梯度分析。实验表明，自回归PINO代理在3298天全时段上R²>0.99(油)、>0.90(气)、≈0.80(压力)、水相单调提升，8块NVIDIA B200 GPU训练不到1小时，1000成员集成在单块B200上不到1分钟，相比OPM有限体积模拟器实现约10⁴倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个严格的数学和计算框架，用于使用神经算子对三相黑油储层动力学进行序贯代理建模，解决传统有限体积模拟器计算成本高昂的问题，实现数量级级别的加速。

Method: 围绕四个理论问题展开：(1)乘积Sobolev空间中的函数分析公式化，包括隐式时间步映射的适定性和局部Lipschitz估计；(2)协变量偏移量化，证明Wasserstein-2距离随$W_2 \leq \varepsilon(L^n-1)/(L-1)$增长；(3)物理约束谱稳定性，PINO训练中$\lambda_R \geq \lambda^*_R$将学习到的Jacobian谱半径降至$\rho_F + C\lambda_R^{-1/2}$，实现均匀时间 rollout误差$\leq \varepsilon/(1-\rho)$；(4)K步TBPTT梯度分析，推导几何偏差衰减$O(\rho^K)$、最优窗口$K^*=O(\log(T/\sigma^2))$和Adam收敛$O(1/\sqrt{t}) + O(\rho^{K^*})$。

Result: 自回归PINO代理在3298天全时段上实现：油相R²>0.99，气相R²>0.90，压力R²≈0.80，水相R²单调提升。训练在8块NVIDIA B200 GPU上不到1小时完成。1000成员集成在单块B200 GPU上不到1分钟，相比OPM有限体积模拟器实现约10⁴倍加速。

Conclusion: 作者从理论上证明了神经算子代理模型在储层模拟中的可行性和稳定性，实证结果验证了所有理论预测，表明该方法能够在保持高精度的同时实现显著的计算加速，适用于大规模油藏模拟和不确定性量化等需要大量模拟的场景。

Abstract: We develop a comprehensive mathematical and computational framework for sequential surrogate modeling of three-phase black-oil reservoir dynamics using neural operators, with particular emphasis on Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) and their physics-informed variant (PINO). The application focus is the Norne benchmark reservoir, defined on a heterogeneous $46\times112\times22$ grid ($N=113,344$ cells), with a production history spanning $T=30$ timesteps covering 3298 days. Our theoretical contributions are organized around four interlocking problems: (1) functional-analytic formulation in a product-Sobolev-space setting, including well-posedness of the implicit timestep map and sharp local Lipschitz estimates; (2) covariate shift quantification, proving that the Wasserstein-2 distance grows as $W_2 \leq \varepsilon(L^n-1)/(L-1)$, with exponential population-risk discrepancy for $L>1$; (3) physics-constrained spectral stability, showing PINO training with $λ_R \geq λ^*_R$ reduces the learned Jacobian spectral radius to $ρ_F + Cλ_R^{-1/2}$, yielding uniform-in-time rollout error $|δ_n| \leq \varepsilon/(1-ρ)$; and (4) $K$-step TBPTT gradient analysis, deriving geometric bias decay $O(ρ^K)$, optimal window $K^ = O(\log(T/σ^2))$, and Adam convergence $O(1/\sqrt{t}) + O(ρ^{K^*})$. Empirical validation confirms all theoretical predictions: autoregressive PINO surrogates sustain $R^2>0.99$ (oil), $R^2>0.90$ (gas), $R^2\approx 0.80$ (pressure), and monotonically improving $R^2$ (water) across the full 3298-day horizon, trained on eight NVIDIA B200 GPUs in under one hour. A 1000-member ensemble runs in under one minute on a single B200 GPU, giving a ${\sim}10^4\times$ wall-clock speedup over the OPM finite-volume simulator.

</details>


### [478] [Cycle-Space Informed Detection of Autoencoded Blind False Data Injection Attacks on Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28912)
*Xin Li,Chenhan Xiao,Jonathan Cohen,Aviad Elyashar,Yang Weng,Rami Puzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对数据驱动型虚假数据注入攻击（FDIA）利用零空间逃逸检测的问题，本文提出了一种基于拓扑的环空间检测器（CSD），通过利用电网的最小环基（MCB）实现最优泛化误差，无需精确线路参数即可有效检测攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于统计或数据驱动的检测方法在面对攻击者利用相同数据结构构造的隐形扰动时容易失效，尤其是盲FDIA可通过自编码器学习量测流形并沿雅可比零空间生成扰动，从而绕过残差检测器和时间序列异常检测器。

Method: 提出拓扑感知的Cycle-Space检测器（CSD），利用网络的环空间（Cycle-Space）施加结构约束，增强零空间估计；并证明使用最小环基（MCB）可使CSD达到攻击检测的最优泛化误差。

Result: 在IEEE 14、30、57、118节点系统上的仿真结果表明，所提方法在存在真实量测噪声的情况下能有效检测数据驱动型FDIA。

Conclusion: CSD利用拓扑导出的环约束而非仅依赖数值零空间估计，不需要精确线路参数，能更好地区分正常量测与受攻击量测，为电力系统FDIA检测提供了鲁棒且可泛化的新范式。

Abstract: The rapid growth of AI-driven data centers and large-scale energy storage systems is increasing the reliance of power system operation on real-time measurement data and automated decision-making. However, many existing detection methods rely on statistical or data-driven analysis of measurements and can fail when attackers exploit the same data structure to craft stealthy perturbations. To illustrate this limitation, we demonstrate a blind False Data Injection Attack (FDIA) in which an Autoencoder learns the measurement manifold and generates perturbations aligned with the Jacobian null space, thereby allowing the attack to evade both residual-based baddata detectors and time-series anomaly detectors. To mitigate data-driven FDIAs which exploit the null space, we propose a topology-informed Cycle-Space Detector (CSD) that leverages the Cycle-Space of the network to impose structural constraints that enhance null space estimation. In addition, we prove that by using the Minimum Cycle Basis (MCB), the proposed CSD achieves the optimal generalization error for attack detection. By exploiting topology-derived cycle constraints rather than relying solely on numerical null space estimation, the proposed method does not require precise line parameters and improves the separation between normal and attacked measurements. Simulation results on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems demonstrate that the proposed method effectively detects data-driven FDIAs under realistic measurement noise.

</details>


### [479] [CosmicFish-HRM: Adaptive Reasoning via Hierarchical Recurrent Mechanisms in Compact Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28919)
*Venkat Akhil Lakkapragada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CosmicFish-HRM，一种通过分层推理模块（HRM）动态分配推理深度的紧凑型语言模型，在小型规模下推理开销较大，但随模型规模增长，这种自适应推理策略有望成为单纯扩大参数量的替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型虽推理能力强，但参数量庞大、推理成本高昂，作者希望探索一条不同路径：在紧凑模型中通过自适应推理深度来提升效率，而非单纯依赖扩大参数量。

Method: 构建了一个分层推理模块（HRM），模型在推理时通过高、低层推理循环迭代，并根据输入复杂度动态学习何时停止；同时结合了Grouped Query Attention、RoPE、SwiGLU等现代Transformer组件。

Result: 模型学会了非均匀的推理行为，能够根据任务和输入的不同分配不同的推理步数。

Conclusion: 自适应推理深度有望成为单纯依赖参数规模来获取推理能力的一种有前景的替代方案。

Abstract: Large language models have achieved strong reasoning capabilities, though often at the cost of massive parameter counts and expensive inference. In this work, we explore a different direction: adaptive reasoning depth in compact language models. We present CosmicFish-HRM, a compact language model built around a Hierarchical Reasoning Module (HRM) that dynamically allocates computational effort during inference. Instead of applying fixed computation to every input, the model iterates through high-level and low-level reasoning cycles and learns when to halt based on input complexity. CosmicFish-HRM combines this adaptive reasoning core with modern transformer components including Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, and SwiGLU activations. While the additional reasoning infrastructure introduces overhead at small scale, we hypothesize that this tradeoff becomes increasingly favorable as model size grows and the relative cost of the HRM core diminishes. Our results show that the model learns non-uniform reasoning behavior, allocating different numbers of reasoning steps across tasks and inputs. These findings suggest that adaptive reasoning depth may offer a promising alternative to relying solely on parameter scale for reasoning capability.

</details>


### [480] [LoopFM: Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of Foundation Model for Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29280)
*Shali Jiang,Hua Zheng,Boyang Liu,Laming Chen,Kenny Lov,Chuanqi Xu,Lisang Ding,Qinghai Zhou,Can Cui,Xiaolong Liu,Xiaoyi Liu,Yasmine Badr,Xin Xu,Jiyan Yang,Ellie Dingqiao Wen,Gerard Jonathan Mugisha Akkerhuis,Chenxiao Guan,Rong Jin,Ruichao Qiu,Xian Chen,Shifu Xu,Zhehui Zhou,Ping Chen,Rui Yang,Haicheng Chen,Xiangge Meng,Song Zhou,Dharak Kharod,Shuyu Xu,Qiang Jin,Qiao Yang,Wankun Zhu,Qin Huang,Yuzhen Huang,Darren Liu,Parish Aggarwal,Hui Zhou,Erzhuo Wang,Shuo Chang,Xiaorui Gan,Wenlin Chen,Santanu Kolay,Huayu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LoopFM框架，通过利用大模型(FM)的中间历史表示作为垂直小模型(VM)的结构化输入特征，建立高带宽知识迁移通道，显著提升知识迁移比率，在工业级系统上实现+0.5%~+1.22%的转化率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统知识蒸馏(KD)仅从大模型迁移单一标量预测结果到小模型，无法传递大模型学到的丰富中间知识，导致迁移比率（小模型捕获的大模型改进比例）不断下降。

Method: LoopFM框架将大模型(FM)的中间层嵌入表示（如用户历史序列）结构化后作为下游小模型(VM)的输入特征，无需实时FM推理服务，也无需FM与VM架构耦合，并通过增益分解和迁移比率分析提供理论支撑。

Result: 在TaobaoAd等三个公开基准上AUC提升6%+；在工业级系统（万亿参数FM、数十亿样本）上，LoopFM在KD基础上使知识迁移比率翻倍，Y1H1转化率提升+0.5%，Y1H2两个独立上线分别提升+1.03%和+1.22%。

Conclusion: LoopFM通过开放高带宽迁移通道，有效解决了传统KD知识传递瓶颈，能与KD互补，显著提升工业场景下的知识迁移效果。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers a single scalar prediction from a large foundation model (FM) to compact vertical models (VMs), suffering from diminishing transfer ratio -- the fraction of FM improvement captured by the VM -- as a single scalar cannot convey the rich intermediate knowledge that larger FMs learn. To address this bottleneck, we propose LoopFM (Learning frOm HistOrical ReP*resentations of FM), a framework that opens a high-bandwidth transfer channel by structuring FM intermediate embeddings as input features (e.g., user history sequence) for downstream VMs, without requiring real-time FM inference at serving and architectural coupling between FM and VM. We provide a theoretical framework for LoopFM with a gain decomposition and transfer-ratio analysis. On three public benchmarks, LoopFM demonstrates strong AUC improvements (e.g., 6\%+ on TaobaoAd) and complementary knowledge transfer capability with KD. On industrial-scale systems (billions of examples, trillion-parameter FMs), LoopFM approximately doubles the knowledge transfer ratio on top of KD, delivering a +0.5\% conversion improvement in Y1H1, and a +1.03\% and +1.22\% conversion improvement from two individual launches respectively in Y1H2.

</details>


### [481] [Conf-Gen: Conformal Uncertainty Quantification for Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28920)
*Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Kevin Zhang,Wei Cui,Marc T. Law,Kin Kwan Leung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Conformal Generation (Conf-Gen)框架，将保形预测扩展到生成式AI任务（如LLM、图像生成等），在不依赖传统监督学习假设的情况下提供统计保证，并通过多个新应用验证其灵活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CP/CRC方法主要面向监督学习，无法直接适用于无监督生成式AI模型（如LLM、图像生成器）。本文旨在填补这一空白，为生成任务提供形式化的不确定性量化框架。

Method: 在CRC框架基础上进行适配，放宽理论假设，提出Conf-Gen框架。该框架统一并泛化了过往将CP应用于LLM的尝试，并将其拓展至全新领域。

Result: 通过三个新颖应用验证了方法的灵活性：(1)图像生成器产生非记忆化图像；(2)对话AI提出足够澄清问题；(3)AI智能体的输出正确性。均获得了保形保证。

Conclusion: Conf-Gen成功将保形方法从监督学习扩展到生成式AI领域，为LLM、图像生成器等模型提供了理论上的不确定性量化保障，具有广泛的适用潜力。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) and its extension, conformal risk control (CRC), are established frameworks for quantifying uncertainty in supervised machine learning through formal guarantees. However, recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence (AI) have been driven by unsupervised generative models, such as large language models (LLMs) and image generators, which are not directly compatible with CP or CRC. In this work we introduce conformal generation (Conf-Gen), a general framework adapting CRC to generative tasks while relaxing its theoretical assumptions. Conf-Gen unifies and generalizes previous attempts to apply CP to LLMs, and extends conformal methodology to entirely new domains. We demonstrate the flexibility of Conf-Gen through some novel applications, including obtaining conformal guarantees on: image generators producing non-memorized images, conversational AI systems having asked enough clarifying questions, and the output of AI agents being correct.

</details>


### [482] [A Training-Time Diagnostic for Generalization via the Log-Alignment Ratio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28975)
*Ali Shehper,Ashish Vaswani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新定义了log-alignment ratio (LAR)，从权重谱和激活谱的重叠角度衡量参数-激活对齐，证明LAR能追踪记忆与泛化之间的转变，预测有效维度并追踪泛化差距，且计算开销极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以解释模型从记忆到泛化的转变过程，且缺乏可在线计算、无需验证数据的泛化度量指标。作者希望利用参数化理论中的LAR来填补这一空白。

Method: 将LAR重新表述为矩阵归一化奇异值平方的谱分布p与输入在其奇异方向上投影的谱分布q之间的重叠度量；通过实验验证其在grokking和3B参数语言模型预训练中的行为。

Result: 在grokking中，LAR能预测有效维度k≈n^{2(1-LAR)}；在大规模预训练中，LAR与非过拟合基线的偏差追踪泛化差距，且下降速率在过拟合临近时加快。

Conclusion: LAR是一个高效、无需验证数据的泛化度量指标，能在前向传播中几乎零额外开销地计算，有效指示模型从记忆到泛化的转变。

Abstract: We study the log-alignment ratio (LAR), a measure of parameter-activation alignment, introduced in parameterization theory. We reformulate it as the overlap between a weight spectrum $p$ of the normalized squared singular values of a matrix and an activation spectrum $q$ of the normalized squared projections of inputs onto its singular directions.
