These results identify block-size diversity as a practical and previously underexplored axis for branch-parallel dLLM inference.

</details>


### [519] [SigmaMedStat: Temporal Signal Modeling for ICU False Alarm Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29236)
*Arunkumar Ramachandran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SigmaMedStat通过将ICU警报信号切分为10秒片段并生成连续小波变换谱图，结合EfficientNet-B0编码器和LSTM时序建模，在PhysioNet 2015数据集上实现AUC 0.822，显著优于静态基线方法（AUC 0.641）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ICU警报疲劳严重危害患者安全——每天每患者产生350+次警报，其中72-99%无临床意义。现有方法缺乏对警报信号可信度的智能评估，导致医护人员脱敏，增加真实紧急事件被遗漏的风险。

Method: 将60秒警报记录切分为6个10秒块，对每块生成CWT谱图；用共享权重的EfficientNet-B0提取每块特征；将特征序列输入两层LSTM网络进行时序建模；五折分层交叉验证评估。

Result: 整体AUC 0.822 ± 0.016（95% CI: [0.790, 0.853]），远超静态基线（AUC 0.641）；消融实验验证时间分块和多通道融合均独立贡献性能；心室扑动分类最佳（AUC 0.820），心脏停搏最困难（AUC 0.722）；主要失败模式为65例假阴性和85例高置信度误分类。

Conclusion: 时间分块+多通道融合的时序建模方法能有效评估ICU警报可信度，减少假警报干扰，具有临床实用价值。代码和结果已开源，便于复现和后续研究。

Abstract: Alarm fatigue in intensive care units (ICUs) is a well documented patient safety crisis. Clinical monitors generate 350 or more alarms per patient per day, out of which 72-99% are clinically irrelevant. Staff desensitization to non-actionable alarms increases the risk of missed true emergencies. This paper presents SigmaMedStat, a machine learning system that evaluates the trustworthiness of physiological alarm signals before clinical action is taken. Four approaches were evaluated on the PhysioNet/Computing in Cardiology Challenge 2015 dataset of 498 four-channel ICU alarm recordings. Primary contribution is a temporal modeling framework that splits each 60 second recording into six consecutive 10-second chunks, and this in turn generates Continuous Wavelet Transform (CWT) scalograms per chunk, encodes each chunk with a shared EfficientNet-B0 encoder, and passes the resulting feature sequence to a two-layer Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network. Five-fold stratified cross-validation yields a mean AUC of 0.822 +/- 0.016 (95% CI: [0.790,0.853]), compared to 0.641 for a static EfficientNet baseline trained on the full 60-second window. Ablation studies confirm that temporal chunking and multi-channel signal fusion both contribute independently to classification performance. Per-alarm type analysis reveals that Ventricular Flutter is the most accurately classified alarm type (AUC 0.820) while Asystole remains the hardest (AUC 0.722). Error analysis identifies 65 false negatives and 85 high-confidence misclassifications as the primary failure modes. All code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/Arun-K-Ram/sigmamedstat.

</details>


### [520] [KLAS: Using Similarity to Stitch Neural Networks for Improved Accuracy-Efficiency Tradeoffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29259)
*Debopam Sanyal,Anantharaman Iyer,Alind Khare,Trisha Jain,Akshay Jajoo,Myungjin Lee,Clayton Kerce,Alexey Tumanov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出KLAS框架，利用KL散度自动选择最优拼接配置，在相同计算成本下提升拼接模型的准确率-效率权衡曲线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型拼接方法依赖启发式规则选择拼接配置，导致次优的精度-效率权衡且缺乏泛化性，需要更系统化的选择方法。

Method: 提出KLAS框架，利用中间表示的KL散度自动选择最优拼接位置，从O(k²n²)种可能中识别最有潜力的二元拼接。

Result: 在相同微调成本下，KLAS在ImageNet-1K上top-1准确率最高提升1.21%，或在保持精度时将FLOPs降低1.33倍。

Conclusion: 通过显式捕捉模型间的表示相似性，KLAS实现了更优且更具泛化性的拼接选择，自动化了跨模型家族的拼接配置搜索。

Abstract: Given the wide range of deployment targets, flexible model selection is essential for optimizing performance within a given compute budget. Recent work demonstrates that stitching pretrained models within a model family enables cost-effective interpolation of the accuracy-efficiency tradeoff space. Stitching transforms intermediate activations from one pretrained model into another, producing a new interpolated stitched network. Such networks provide a pool of deployment options along the accuracy-efficiency spectrum. However, existing stitching approaches often yield suboptimal tradeoffs and lack generalizability, as they primarily rely on heuristics to select stitch configurations. We argue that constructing improved accuracy-efficiency tradeoffs requires explicitly capturing and leveraging the similarity between pretrained models being stitched. To this end, we introduce KLAS, a novel stitch selection framework that automates and generalizes stitch selection across model families by leveraging KL divergence between intermediate representations. KLAS identifies the most promising binary stitches from the $O(k^2n^2)$ possibilities for $k$ pretrained models of depth $n$. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that KLAS improves the accuracy-efficiency curve of stitched models at the same finetuning cost as baselines. KLAS achieves up to $1.21\%$ higher ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy at the same computational cost, or maintains accuracy with a $1.33\times$ reduction in FLOPs.

</details>


### [521] [Robust Frequency-Calibrated Virtual EEG Channel Generation from Four Frontal Electrodes for Wearable EEG Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29263)
*Minghao Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FAVC-Net，从4个额叶EEG通道（Fp1, Fp2, F7, F8）生成13个缺失通道。该网络结合多尺度源编码、状态嵌入、有符号源块混合、图注意力细化等模块，并在时域和频域联合优化。在PRED+CT数据集上，频谱指标显著优于基线（PSD KL散度降低37.98%），且对可穿戴噪声具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低通道可穿戴EEG（仅4个额叶电极）虽然便于长期监测，但空间覆盖稀疏且有偏，无法获取后部和顶叶区域的活动信息。现有方法多将稀疏到密集的EEG生成视为纯波形匹配任务，忽略了频谱保真度和通道间的频率纹理。

Method: FAVC-Net包含：共享多尺度源编码器、源状态嵌入、目标条件的有符号源块混合、GATv2图注意力细化、注意力一致跳跃融合、弱Welch功率谱密度校准。联合优化时域幅度、频谱分配、通道-频率纹理及对损坏输入的鲁棒性。

Result: 在PRED+CT数据集上，FAVC-Net达到最佳时域-频谱联合性能。与最强非FAVC方法相比，对数谱距离降低30.09%，PSD KL散度降低37.98%。在可穿戴源扰动下，模型保持频谱保真度，抵抗频谱坍塌。

Conclusion: 虚拟EEG通道生成应被视为双域增强问题（时域+频域）。生成的通道是源于稀疏额叶测量的频率校准表示，而非独立的物理记录。

Abstract: Low-channel wearable electroencephalography (EEG) is attractive for long-term monitoring, but four frontal electrodes provide only a sparse and spatially biased view of distributed scalp activity. We present FAVC-Net, a compact frequency-calibrated virtual-channel network that generates 13 unmeasured EEG channels from Fp1, Fp2, F7, and F8. The model combines shared multi-scale source encoding, source-state embeddings, target-conditioned signed source-block mixing, GATv2-based attention refinement, attention-consistent skip fusion, and weak Welch power spectral density calibration. Rather than treating sparse-to-dense EEG generation as a purely waveform-matching task, the framework jointly emphasizes amplitude fidelity, spectral allocation, channel-frequency texture, and robustness to corrupted wearable inputs. On the PRED+CT dataset, FAVC-Net achieved the best joint waveform-spectral operating point among neural and interpolation baselines. Its time-domain gains were modest, whereas log-spectral distance and PSD KL divergence were reduced by 30.09% and 37.98% relative to the strongest non-FAVC comparator. Under wearable-like source perturbations, the model preserved spectral fidelity and resisted spectral collapse. These results support virtual EEG channel generation as a dual-domain augmentation problem, while emphasizing that generated posterior and parietal channels should be interpreted as frequency-calibrated representations derived from sparse frontal measurements rather than as independent physical recordings.

</details>


### [522] [Causal Label Recovery in Payment Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29272)
*Gaurav Dhama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对支付网络欺诈检测中标签存在系统性偏差的问题，提出了序贯三重稳健（STR）估计量，该估计量同时纠正授权、报告、延迟和标签污染四类偏差，达到半参数效率界，并允许使用数天前的数据而非数月的陈旧数据进行训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欺诈检测模型依赖的退单标签存在四类系统性偏差：授权拒绝导致无标签、发卡行未报告、延迟缺失以及标签被误分类或被滥用污染。已有理论证明了这些偏差带来的性能下界，本文旨在探究能否达到该下界。

Method: 将观察流程建模为包含三个倾向性阶段和一个污染层的序贯缺失数据问题；构建序贯三重稳健（STR）估计量，在每个门控阶段仅需倾向性模型或结果回归模型之一正确即可保证一致性；采用噪声率调整伪标签进行纠偏、经验贝叶斯收缩稳定小发卡行的逆倾向权重、插件方差估计量以及Bernstein浓度不等式。推导了最优训练延迟（成熟窗口）。

Result: STR估计量达到了半参数效率界（渐近方差最小）；在均方误差上严格优于朴素退单训练；允许使用仅数天前的数据而非数月数据训练，解耦了模型新鲜度与退单成熟周期。

Conclusion: 本文从理论和实践两方面证明了通过STR方法可以克服支付系统欺诈标签的系统性偏差，同时提高模型时效性和检测精度。

Abstract: Fraud detection models in payment networks train on chargeback labels that are systematically biased. Every label must survive three sequential gates: authorization (declined transactions generate no labels), issuer reporting (unreported fraud is invisible), and delay (pending chargebacks are missing at training time). Labels that do arrive may be corrupted by first-party misuse or issuer misclassification. A companion paper [arXiv:2605.27557] proved that these four impairments impose a minimax lower bound on detection performance. This paper asks: can that bound be achieved?
  We formalize the observation pipeline as a sequential missing-data problem with three propensity stages and a corruption layer, and construct the Sequential Triply Robust (STR) estimator. The STR corrects for all four impairments simultaneously and achieves the semiparametric efficiency bound -- no estimator can have lower asymptotic variance. It is sequentially triply robust: at each gate, consistency requires only that either the propensity model or the outcome regression is correctly specified, not both. We provide corruption correction via noise-rate-adjusted pseudo-labels, empirical Bayes shrinkage to stabilize inverse-propensity weights for small issuers, a plug-in variance estimator yielding valid confidence intervals, and a Bernstein concentration inequality for finite-sample guarantees.
  On the operational side, we derive the optimal training delay -- the maturity window that minimizes the sum of label-quality loss and model staleness -- and prove that the STR permits training on data that is days old rather than months old, decoupling model freshness from the chargeback maturity cycle. The STR provably dominates naive chargeback-based training in mean squared error for any sample size.

</details>


### [523] [A Theoretical and Experimental Study of a Novel Adaptive Learning Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29273)
*Sakshi Kumari,Shyam Kumar M,Sushmitha P*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文回顾了Adam和AMSGrad等自适应优化方法，并提出了一种基于视线方法的新优化器C-Adam，提供了收敛性理论证明，并通过数值实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自适应优化器（如Adam）虽然广泛使用，但存在不保证收敛的问题，AMSGrad虽尝试解决但仍有限制。因此需要设计一种既能保证收敛性又计算高效的新型优化器。

Method: 提出C-Adam优化器，基于"视线方法"（line of sight approach）设计，并给出了收敛性的理论证明。

Result: 通过多个基于真实场景的数值实验，验证了C-Adam优化器的有效性和优越性。

Conclusion: C-Adam在保证收敛性的同时，克服了Adam和AMSGrad的局限性，是一种更优的自适应优化方法。

Abstract: A crucial component of machine learning algorithms is minimizing loss functions with less computational cost and less oscillations. While adaptive learning rate-based optimizers have been widely used for real-world tasks, they do not guarantee convergence, which is why AMSGrad was later introduced to investigate the non-convergence behaviour of Adam. In this paper, popular adaptive optimization methods like Adam and AMSGrad are critically reviewed with an emphasis on their fundamental design concepts. To address limitations of the above mentioned optimizers, a new optimizer variant, C-Adam, is proposed based on the line of sight approach. A theoretical proof for convergence is also provided and the optimizer is validated through a number of real-life based numerical experiments.

</details>


### [524] [Do Physics Foundation Models Learn Generalizable Physics? A Bias-Aware Benchmark Across Physical Regimes and Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29283)
*Mengdi Chu,Yang Liu,Ayan Biswas,Han-Wei Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇论文构建了包含8种物理动力学、3种训练数据混合和25种测试条件的基准，对5种物理基础模型架构及其变体进行了6万次测量，发现当前物理基础模型是条件性而非通用性的学习者，其泛化能力受限于物理机制、时间尺度、初始条件、预训练、模型大小和架构等多种因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的物理基础模型声称具备通用时空预测能力，但其评估往往仅在一个固定训练分布下给出单一平均分数，难以判断模型是否真正学习了可泛化的物理动力学，还是仅在特定设置下表现良好。

Method: 构建了一个包含8种物理动力学、3种训练数据混合和25种测试条件的基准测试，涵盖分布内、分布偏移和分布外三种设置。评估了5种物理基础模型架构及每种架构的4种变体（从零训练和三种预训练规模），共获得60,000个测量数据。

Result: 当前物理基础模型表现为条件性而非通用性学习者：其通用性依赖于物理机制、时间尺度、初始条件、预训练、模型大小和架构。改进训练数据分布只能部分缓解这一局限，预训练和规模扩展也无法可靠地消除能力偏差。

Conclusion: 改进物理基础模型需要超越扩展模型或扩充数据的思路，转向学习能够更好地捕捉跨机制、时间尺度和分布偏移的可迁移物理知识的机制。

Abstract: Recent physics foundation models claim general spatiotemporal forecasting ability, yet their evaluations often collapse performance into a single average score under a fixed training distribution. This makes it difficult to determine whether a model has learned generalizable physical dynamics or only performs well under particular settings. We construct a benchmark with 8 physical dynamics, 3 training-data mixtures, and 25 test regimes induced by dynamic-scale and initial-condition complexity shifts, covering in-distribution, distribution-shift, and out-of-distribution settings. We evaluate five physics foundation model architectures and four model variants per architecture (scratch and three pretrained sizes), resulting in 60,000 measurements. Our results show that current physics foundation models behave as conditional rather than universal generalists: their generality depends on the physical regime, temporal scale, initial-condition setting, pretraining, model size, and architecture. Improving the training data distribution only partially mitigates this limitation. Pretraining and scaling are also unable to reliably remove their ability biases. We argue that improving physics foundation models requires moving beyond scaling models or expanding data, toward learning mechanisms that better capture transferable physical knowledge across regimes, temporal scales, and distribution shifts.

</details>


### [525] [NeuroEdge: Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition with High-Density EMG Using Deep Learning at the Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29326)
*Peter Chudinov,Zhenyu Lin,Jay Motamarry,Srihita Panati,Xiaorong Zhang,Zhuwei Qin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuroEdge是一个实时HD-EMG手势识别系统，在资源受限的微控制器上实现了基于192通道HD-EMG的七种手势识别，准确率达90%，平均延迟83ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在EMG手势识别中精度高，但部署到嵌入式硬件面临计算和内存限制的挑战，缺乏轻量化的实时解决方案。

Method: 设计HD-EMG StreamBridge（无线数据流接口）和EdgeDL Inference Engine（轻量推理引擎），采用紧凑1D CNN、DMA数据传输、SPI突发通信以及流水线同步架构。

Result: 在192通道HD-EMG上实现七种手势90%的实时分类准确率，平均延迟83ms。

Conclusion: 证明了在微控制器级边缘设备上部署复杂HD-EMG手势识别的可行性，弥合了高分辨率生物信号采集与深度学习嵌入式推理之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: High-density electromyography (HD-EMG) has emerged as a powerful modality for decoding fine-grained neuromuscular activity, enabling real-time neural-machine interfaces (NMIs) for applications such as prosthetic control, rehabilitation, and augmented interaction. While deep learning approaches such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs)have demonstrated high classification accuracy for EMG-based gesture recognition, their deployment on embedded hardware remains a major challenge due to computational and memory constraints. This paper presents NeuroEdge, a real-time HD EMG-based NMI system that performs gesture recognition entirely on resource-constrained microcontrollers. The system features two custom-designed modules: the HD-EMG StreamBridge, a wireless communication interface that streams raw HD-EMG data from a Quattrocento amplifier to an ESP32 microcontroller; and the EdgeDL Inference Engine, a lightweight deep learning framework executing on a Sony Spresense microcontroller. A compact 1-dimensional CNN optimized for embedded inference processes, sliding windows of EMG data in real time. Data streaming and inference are pipelined and synchronized through an architecture that utilizes Direct Memory Access (DMA) for data transfer and Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI) burst communication between the ESP32 and Spresense, ensuring low-latency performance. Experimental results show that NeuroEdge achieves a real-time classification accuracy of 90% across seven hand gestures, with a total average latency of 83 ms using 192 channels of HD-EMG recorded from the forearm. Our system demonstrates the feasibility of deploying complex HD-EMG-based gesture recognition on microcontroller-based edge devices, bridging the gap between high-resolution biosignal acquisition and deep learning-based embedded inference for next-generation NMIs.

</details>


### [526] [Attention as In-Context Empirical Bayes: A Two-Stage View via Particle Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29351)
*Matthew Smart,Soumya Ganguly,Nilava Metya,Alexandre V. Morozov,Anirvan M. Sengupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究最小注意力仅Transformer在全标记破坏下的两阶段经验贝叶斯解释：单层注意力计算核加权后验均值，深度通过粒子动力学细化分布（阶段1），长程跳跃连接携带噪声输入作为后验推断的查询（阶段2），揭示了深度和注意力残差的统计角色差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 希望理解注意力机制在Transformer中的统计本质，揭示深度和残差连接在上下文推断中的不同统计角色，以及去噪能力如何在没有显式噪声调度的情况下自然涌现。

Method: 理论分析最小注意力仅Transformer，将其建模为两阶段经验贝叶斯过程：阶段1通过深度（多层注意力堆叠）实现粒子动力学以细化经验分布；阶段2利用长程跳跃连接将噪声输入作为查询进行后验推断。分析固定核带宽和有限积分步长下的去噪能力，建立后验均值恢复保证。

Result: 1) 注意力机制可解释为核加权后验均值估计；2) 深度和残差连接承担不同统计功能；3) 固定核带宽和有限深度足以实现有效去噪；4) 建立了深度与噪声之间的理论关系；5) 提供了后验均值恢复的理论保证。

Conclusion: 注意力机制可被统计解释为通过基于样本的后验估计进行上下文推断，而无需显式密度建模；该框架将上下文推断与反向扩散极限联系起来，为Transformer的上下文学习能力提供了统计基础。

Abstract: We study minimal attention-only transformers under all-token corruption and show they admit a two-stage empirical Bayes interpretation. A single attention step computes a kernel-weighted posterior mean with respect to the empirical distribution defined by the context. Depth refines this distribution through particle dynamics (Stage 1), while a long-range skip-connection carries the noisy input as a query for posterior inference (Stage 2), revealing distinct statistical roles for depth and attention residuals. The framework isolates a minimal setting in which the context itself induces a depth-dependent energy landscape governing in-context inference. We show that effective denoising can emerge without an explicit noise schedule: a fixed kernel bandwidth and finite integration horizon suffice, yielding a principled depth-noise relationship. We further establish a posterior-mean recovery guarantee for a class of well-behaved priors, where the empirical estimator converges to the Bayes-optimal predictor under asymptotic conditions. Connecting these dynamics to reverse-diffusion limits, our results provide a statistical interpretation of attention as in-context inference via sample-based posterior estimation, without explicit density modeling.

</details>


### [527] [Neural-Behavioral Representation of Natural Whole-body Movement in Monkeys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29355)
*Jieshi He,Puzhe Li,Yanan Sui,Mu-ming Poo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种针对自由活动猴子的神经-行为记录与建模框架，结合大规模硬膜外皮层信号和多视角动作捕捉，通过自回归编码器-解码器模型成功解码了自然的全身运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统运动解码研究受限于约束任务和有限肢体运动，无法捕捉自然全身行为的神经表征，而本文旨在突破这一局限。

Method: 搭建了定制化数据采集平台，同步记录来自感觉和运动相关区域的大规模硬膜外皮层信号与多视角动作捕捉数据，并采用自回归编码器-解码器模型学习行为先验并解码全身运动。

Result: 模型在无需显式物理约束的条件下，成功解码出准确且逼真的全身运动。

Conclusion: 为利用大规模颅内神经活动解码灵长类自然全身运动提供了概念验证性的新方法。

Abstract: Understanding how cortical activity represents natural whole-body behaviors in primates remains challenging. Limited by the diversity of movements and inaccessibility of large-scale neural representation of whole-body kinematics, previous motor decoding studies focused on constrained tasks and limited limb movements. Here, we present a neural-behavioral recording and modeling framework for freely moving monkeys, combining large-scale epidural cortical signals from distributed sensory- and motor-related areas with synchronized multi-view motion capture through a custom-made data collection platform. We reconstructed whole-body monkey kinematics and learned a compact behavior prior using an autoregressive encoder-decoder model. Conditioned on neural signals, the model decoded accurate and realistic whole-body movement without explicit physical constraints. Our results provide a novel proof-of-concept approach for decoding natural whole-body movements in primates using large-scale intracranial neural activity.

</details>


### [528] [Solving Integer Linear Programming with Parallel Tempering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29366)
*Kyuil Sim,Sanghyeok Choi,Jinkyoo Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需求解器、无需训练的基于采样的ILP优化框架，利用局部平衡提议和平行回火（含惩罚回火）直接探索离散可行域，在多个基准上超越SCIP，与Gurobi竞争，且对分布偏移更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ILP求解依赖精确求解器或启发式方法，学习型方法泛化性差且依赖外部求解器，亟需一种无需训练和外部求解器的通用优化框架。

Method: 提出无求解器、无训练的采样优化框架，利用ILP线性结构设计局部平衡提议构建转移核，结合标准温度回火和惩罚回火（调节约束屏障同时保持可行解目标景观）来克服多模态能量景观。

Result: 在四个基准上一致优于SCIP，两个任务中匹配或超过Gurobi（200秒预算内），对分布偏移显著优于学习方法，在MIPLIB 2017上无需调参即可与经典求解器竞争。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效克服了ILP的多模态挑战，兼具无需训练、无需外部求解器、泛化鲁棒性强的优势，为ILP优化提供了新的高效替代方案。

Abstract: Integer Linear Programming (ILP) serves as a versatile framework for modeling a wide range of combinatorial optimization problems, typically addressed by sophisticated exact solvers or heuristics. While learning-based approaches have recently shown their effectiveness, they suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution instances and inherent dependence on external solvers. In this work, we propose a solver-free, sampling-based optimization framework for ILP that directly explores discrete feasible regions without training or external solvers. Exploiting the linear structure of ILP, we employ a Locally-Balanced Proposal to construct a transition kernel, thereby avoiding the gradient approximation. To overcome the highly multimodal nature of ILP energy landscapes, we integrate Parallel Tempering. In addition to standard temperature tempering, we introduce penalty tempering, which modulates constraint barriers while preserving the objective landscape over feasible solutions. Empirically, our method consistently outperforms SCIP across all four benchmarks, matches or exceeds Gurobi on two of four tasks within a 200-second budget, and is substantially more robust to distribution shift than learning-based methods. Furthermore, on MIPLIB 2017 instances, our framework remains competitive with classical solvers without any problem-specific tuning.

</details>


### [529] [Deep Adaptive Dimension Reduction for Bayesian Inference in Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29373)
*Yueyang Wang,Xili Wang,Kejun Tang,Xiaoliang Wan,Tao Zhou,Chao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于变分流（VF）的深度自适应降维贝叶斯推断框架，用于求解高维PDE反问题。该框架结合VAE非线性降维、双归一化流、迭代先验更新和自适应FNO代理模型，在多个基准问题上取得优于MCMC、UKI、SVGD的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维PDE反问题面临三大挑战：复杂的非高斯后验分布、昂贵的正演模型计算成本、以及错误指定的先验信息。现有方法如MCMC计算效率低，标准归一化流受限于双射映射无法降维，VAE近似后验能力有限。

Method: 提出变分流（VF）模型，融合VAE非线性降维与双归一化流（分别用于潜在先验和编码器），实现严格高于VAE的ELBO；引入迭代先验更新策略，将先验均值逐步移向高概率后验区域；结合自适应微调的FNO代理模型，形成"VF生成后验样本→优化代理→代理改进后验推断"的闭环自适应框架。

Result: 在100维Rosenbrock问题和三个标准PDE反问题上，该方法在所有测试配置下均达到与MCMC、UKI、SVGD基线相当或更优的精度，在高噪声观测和高维参数空间等挑战场景中优势最为显著。

Conclusion: 所提出的深度自适应降维贝叶斯推断框架有效解决了高维PDE反问题的核心痛点，在精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，尤其适用于高噪声、高维度等困难场景。

Abstract: Solving high-dimensional PDE-governed inverse problems is often challenging due to complex non-Gaussian posterior distributions, expensive forward model evaluations, and misspecified prior information. To address these issues, we propose a deep adaptive dimension-reduction Bayesian inference framework based on the Variational Flow (VF) model. Since standard normalizing flows are restricted by bijective mappings and cannot directly reduce dimensions, VF overcomes this limitation by integrating VAE-based nonlinear dimension reduction with dual normalizing flows for the latent prior and encoder. This design provides a strictly higher evidence lower bound than VAE and allows more flexible approximation of complex posterior distributions. We further introduce an iterative prior updating strategy that gradually moves the prior mean toward high-probability posterior regions, avoiding manual prior tuning. These components form a closed adaptive loop together with an adaptively fine-tuned Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) surrogate: VF generates posterior-concentrated samples to refine the surrogate, while the updated surrogate further improves posterior inference. Numerical experiments on a 100-dimensional Rosenbrock problem and three standard PDE-governed inverse problems show that our method delivers competitive or superior accuracy compared with MCMC, UKI, and SVGD baselines across all tested configurations, with the most pronounced advantages emerging in challenging scenarios such as high-noise observations and high-dimensional parameter spaces.

</details>


### [530] [TRACER: Persistent Regularization for Robust Multimodal Finetuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29380)
*Hesam Asadollahzadeh,Feng Liu,Christopher Leckie,Sarah M. Erfani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TRACER方法，通过加权移动平均教师（WMA）替代标准EMA，结合对比学习与多视角蒸馏，有效缓解多模态对比微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，在CLIP微调中显著提升OOD鲁棒性与校准性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微调策略在多模态对比学习中常导致灾难性遗忘，即分布外（OOD）鲁棒性下降。标准EMA教师存在坍缩问题，无法有效保持预训练知识。

Method: 建立多模态对比微调的理论框架（封闭解+几何分解）；证明WMA教师相比EMA具有持久正则化力、无偏收敛且能保留正交知识；提出TRACER框架，结合对比学习与WMA引导的多视角蒸馏。

Result: 在CLIP微调实验中，TRACER在三种骨干架构上一致提升了OOD准确率和校准性能；消融实验验证了方法原理合理且对超参数选择鲁棒。

Conclusion: WMA教师能有效克服EMA的坍缩问题，TRACER提供了一种有理论依据且实用的多模态微调鲁棒正则化方案。

Abstract: Mainstream strategies for finetuning pretrained multimodal models often degrade out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness, a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for multimodal contrastive finetuning, yielding closed-form solutions and a geometric decomposition for each strategy. This framework shows that self-distillation is more effective than other regularization approaches to retain the knowledge of the pretrained model. Our analysis reveals a largely overlooked limitation: standard Exponential Moving Average (EMA) teachers, widely used in robust finetuning, suffer from collapse. To solve this, we prove that a Weighted Moving Average (WMA) teacher maintains a persistent regularizing force over finite horizons and yields bias-free convergence in the task subspace while preserving orthogonal knowledge. These insights motivate **TRACER** (**T**rajectory-**R**obust **A**nchoring for **C**ontrastive **E**ncoder **R**egularization), which combines contrastive learning with WMA-guided multi-perspective distillation. Extensive experiments on CLIP finetuning demonstrate consistent OOD accuracy and calibration gains across three backbone architectures, and comprehensive ablations confirm that TRACER is both principled and robust to hyperparameter choices. Code is available at [https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER](https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER).

</details>


### [531] [On the Optimizer Dependence of Neural Scaling Laws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29387)
*Vansh Ramani,Shourya Vir Jain*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现神经缩放定律中的指数α并非固定常数，而是依赖于优化器的选择。在随机特征回归实验中，预条件优化器（如自然梯度）能产生更陡峭的缩放指数（α更大），最高可达梯度下降的2.6倍，但这一优势能否迁移到大语言模型训练中仍待验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为神经缩放定律中的指数α是由架构和数据固定的常数，本文试图探究优化器是否会影响α，从而修正对缩放定律的理解。

Method: 在随机特征回归（random-feature regression）这一神经缩放的理论框架下，控制实验条件，测量五种优化器（包括梯度下降和多种预条件优化器）在六种谱条件（spectral conditions）下的缩放指数α。

Result: 预条件优化器一致地产生更大的α（更陡峭的缩放），α的增量在大部分谱范围内呈上升趋势，在s≈1.5附近达到峰值，在s=2.0时仍保持较大。在自然语言特征谱（s≈1.0）下，自然梯度的α≈0.31，梯度下降的α≈0.12，相差2.6倍。

Conclusion: 优化器选择应纳入缩放定律预测的考量；本文提供了一个谱诊断工具来预测高级优化器何时会带来收益；但该结论向大规模LLM训练的迁移性仍是开放问题。

Abstract: The scaling exponent $α$ in neural scaling laws $L(N) \propto N^{-α}$ is commonly treated as a fixed constant set by architecture and data. We present evidence that $α$ depends systematically on the optimizer. In controlled random-feature regression experiments -- the canonical theoretical framework for neural scaling -- we measure $α$ across five optimizer variants and six spectral conditions. Preconditioned optimizers consistently yield steeper scaling (larger $α$), with the $α$-shift increasing across most of the tested spectral range, peaking near $s = 1.5$, and remaining large at $s = 2.0$. At $s \approx 1.0$ (characteristic of natural language), the full natural gradient achieves $α\approx 0.31$ versus $α\approx 0.12$ for gradient descent -- a $2.6\times$ larger fitted exponent that, within the random-feature model, compounds with each model-size doubling. Whether and how this exponent shift transfers to large-scale LLM training -- where recent evidence suggests the advantage may attenuate with scale -- remains an important open question. Our results imply that scaling-law forecasts should account for optimizer choice, and we provide a spectral diagnostic predicting when advanced optimizers will pay off.

</details>


### [532] [GDSD: Reinforcement Learning as Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29398)
*Xiaohang Tang,Keyue Jiang,Che Liu,Qifang Zhao,Xiaoxiao Xu,Sangwoong Yoon,Ilija Bogunovic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GDSD方法，通过自蒸馏直接优化扩散语言模型的降噪器，避免了传统ELBO方法中的训练-推理不匹配偏差，在规划、数学和编程任务上取得显著提升（最高+19.6%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于ELBO的RL方法虽与预训练对齐，但引入训练-推理不匹配偏差（TIM），用ELBO作为似然替代品会降低性能。

Method: 提出Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation (GDSD)，从逆向KL正则化RL的闭式最优解中推导出优势引导的自教师，通过无归一化目标将dLLM的降噪器logits与教师匹配，将RL转化为无需似然的自我蒸馏，从而绕过TIM偏差。

Result: 在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B上的规划、数学和编程基准测试中，GDSD始终优于先前最先进的ELBO方法，训练奖励更稳定，测试准确率最高提升19.6%。

Conclusion: 直接对降噪器进行自我蒸馏，不依赖ELBO似然替代品，可为扩散语言模型提供更稳定有效的RL流程。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to improve the policy (denoiser) of diffusion large language models (dLLMs), while being hindered by the intractability of the policy likelihood. A dominant and efficient family of methods replaces the likelihood in standard RL with its evidence lower bound (ELBO), estimated from randomly masked sequences. Despite being well aligned with pre-training, these approaches introduce bias through training--inference mismatch by using the ELBO as a likelihood surrogate, which can degrade performance. In this work, we propose Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation (GDSD) to directly distill the denoiser of dLLMs from an advantage-guided self-teacher, derived from the closed-form optimum of reverse-KL regularized RL. GDSD matches the dLLM's denoiser logits to the teacher's via a normalization-free objective, which reduces RL to likelihood-free self-distillation and thus bypasses the TIM biases. Recent ELBO-based methods emerge as instances of applying different distillation divergences, but with diagnosable pathologies that GDSD avoids. On planning, math, and coding benchmarks with LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, GDSD consistently outperforms prior state-of-the-art ELBO-based methods with a more stable training reward dynamics, achieving test-accuracy improvements of up to $+19.6\%$. These results suggest that direct denoiser self-distillation, without relying on an ELBO likelihood surrogate, can provide a more stable and effective RL procedure for dLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/GaryBall/GDSD.

</details>


### [533] [Rethinking Post-Training Recipes for Multimodal Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29401)
*Haoxin Liu,Yichen Zhou,Rajat Sen,B. Aditya Prakash,Abhimanyu Das*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PostTime方法，通过后训练LLM使其利用多模态上下文来修正时间序列基础模型的预测，显著提升多模态时间序列预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型（TSFM）仅能处理数值数据，无法像LLM那样利用多模态、非数值的上下文信息（如文本、图像等），而这些信息对现实世界的时间序列预测至关重要。

Method: 提出PostTime后训练方案，结合监督微调（SFT）和带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），并设计自动化推理轨迹生成方法，训练LLM根据多模态上下文对TSFM的预测结果进行干预（修订、保留或忽略）。

Result: 在TimesX多模态预测基准上，使用Gemma-3-4B LLM和TimesFM-2.5 TSFM，PostTime显著优于单独TSFM、仅LLM基线以及现有多模态预测方法。

Conclusion: PostTime证明了一种有效的方式，将LLM的上下文理解能力与TSFM的数值预测能力相结合，实现更准确的多模态时间序列预测。

Abstract: Time-Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at zero-shot unimodal forecasting using numerical data, but unlike LLMs they cannot consume multimodal, non-numerical context that often shape real-world trajectories. In this work, we bridge this gap and argue for a multimodal time-series forecasting approach that post-trains LLMs to act as context-guided revisors over strong numerical TSFM priors. We introduce PostTime, a post-training recipe combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), along with a methodology to generate automated reasoning traces for forecast revisions. PostTime teaches an LLM to generate context-conditioned forecast interventions -- decisions to revise, preserve, or ignore the TSFM prior based on the multimodal context. We evaluate this approach on the TimesX multimodal forecasting benchmark using a Gemma-3-4B LLM and TimesFM-2.5 TSFM, and show that it significantly outperforms standalone TSFMs, LLM-only baselines, and existing multimodal forecasting approaches.

</details>


### [534] [Information-Directed Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29405)
*Keru Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出信息导向采样（IDS）框架，通过条件互信息形式化离线数据后的残差不确定性，证明IDS在贝叶斯遗憾界上优于汤普森采样，并在离线到在线决策场景中展示了理论优越性和实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线数据集虽能减少不确定性，但无法消除探索需求，只是改变了需要探索的内容（残差不确定性）。现有方法缺乏对这一问题的形式化刻画，本文旨在用信息论方法量化并指导离线到在线场景中的探索。

Method: 1. 用条件互信息 $I(χ;τ_{1:T}\mid\mathcal{D}_N)$ 形式化残差不确定性；2. 提出参数化 $η\ge 0$ 的信息导向采样（IDS）家族，在即时遗憾和信息增益之间做权衡；3. 通过比率证书（ratio certificate）证明IDS继承了汤普森采样策略类的信息率界；4. 在贝叶斯线性奖励模型中给出IDS的显式遗憾界。

Result: 1. IDS的贝叶斯遗憾界为 $\widetilde O(H d \min\{\sqrt{T}, T\sqrt{C^\dagger/N}\})$；2. 在特定warm-start场景中，IDS会选择信息性探测动作而汤普森采样不会，产生常数倍的贝叶斯遗憾分离；3. 在D4RL离线到在线RL实验和bandit实验中验证了IDS在残差不确定性场景下的优势。

Conclusion: 当离线数据有信息量但存在有偏或低概率的残差不确定性时，IDS比汤普森采样更有效，这一机制适用于离线RL、离线黑箱优化和贝叶斯优化等多种场景。

Abstract: Decision-making from offline datasets typically warm-starts a policy or score model from fixed offline data and then refines it with limited online interaction. Offline data reduces uncertainty, but it does not remove the need for exploration; it changes what remains to be explored. We formalise this residual uncertainty by the conditional mutual information $I(χ;τ_{1:T}\mid\mathcal{D}_N)$ between a learning target $χ$ and the online trajectories after conditioning on the offline dataset. This view leads naturally to information-directed sampling (IDS), a family parameterised by $η\ge 0$ that selects actions by trading off instantaneous regret against information gain. We prove a generic offline-to-online Bayesian regret bound for IDS through a ratio certificate: any information-ratio bound satisfied by a reference Thompson-sampling policy over the same randomised policy class is inherited by IDS. In a known-dynamics Bayesian linear-reward model, the conditional mutual information has a log-determinant form, and vanilla IDS ($η=0$) satisfies $\widetilde O\!\left(Hd\min\left\{\sqrt T,\,T\sqrt{C^\dagger_{β,\mathrm{IDS}_0}(N,T)/N}\right\}\right),$ where the coverage coefficient is tied to the visitation distribution induced by vanilla IDS itself. We also identify a warm-start regime with a dominated but informative probe in which vanilla IDS selects the probe while Thompson sampling never does, giving a constant-factor Bayesian regret separation. Controlled bandit experiments and D4RL offline-to-online RL experiments validate this mechanism: IDS is most beneficial when offline data is informative but leaves biased or low-probability residual uncertainty that targeted online actions can resolve, a regime shared by offline RL, offline black-box optimization, and Bayesian optimization.

</details>


### [535] [The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly of Markov Boundary for Tabular Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29411)
*Shu Wan,Abhinav Gorantla,Huan Liu,K. Selçuk Candan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模SCM基准实验发现，马尔可夫边界理论上对预测最优，但实际中因果发现方法恢复的边界反而不如全特征，原因在于发现算法优化结构恢复而非预测，且错误类型代价不对称。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究马尔可夫边界在表格预测任务中是否真正有用，以及为什么理论上的最优特征集在实践中难以发挥作用。

Method: 在SCM3K基准（3450个合成SCM任务，特征数40-1000，6种SCM家族）上，用6种回归器比较使用真实边界、发现恢复的边界与全特征集的预测性能。

Result: 使用真实边界能显著提升预测性能，且特征空间越大越稀疏时提升越明显；但用现有因果发现方法恢复边界后训练，性能不如全特征集。

Conclusion: 现有因果发现方法不适合预测任务，需要设计与预测对齐的特征选择方法，并提出因果结构和表格模型结合的新方向。

Abstract: Under standard graphical assumptions, the Markov boundary of a target variable is the smallest set of features that renders every other feature redundant. Once the boundary is observed, the target is conditionally independent of the rest of the table. This is a tempting object for tabular prediction, since it names exactly the columns a model should need. Yet modern regressors are still trained on the full feature set. We ask whether the Markov boundary is genuinely useful for prediction on SCM3K, a 3,450-task synthetic SCM benchmark with feature counts from 40 to 1000 and six SCM families, evaluated with six regressors. The answer is more nuanced than the theory suggests. Restricting a regressor to the oracle boundary often improves prediction substantially, and the improvement grows as the feature space becomes larger and sparser. But the natural pipeline of recovering the boundary with causal discovery and training on the recovered mask does not deliver. Existing estimators exhaust the compute budget before reaching the regime where the boundary helps most, and even where they run they rarely beat the full feature set. We trace this to three causes. Discovery optimizes structural recovery rather than prediction. False negatives and false positives carry sharply asymmetric predictive cost. The exact boundary is only one of many feature sets that beat all features. We then develop what these facts imply for prediction-aligned feature selection and for tabular models that learn to use causal structure.

</details>


### [536] [How Much Is a Dataset Worth? Scaling Laws, the Vendi Score, and Matrix Spectral Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29448)
*Jeff A. Bilmes,Gantavya Bhatt,Arnav M. Das*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明神经缩放定律目标和Vendi Score均具有次模性，且Vendi Score是一类更广泛的次模目标（矩阵谱函数）的特例。作者提出弱矩阵单调函数导致弱次模矩阵谱函数，开发了基于特征值问题的更新方法，在ImageNet-1K规模上实现了约35,000倍加速。实验发现Facility Location表现最佳，且Vendi Score在高值时成为下游性能的差代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据评估方法（神经缩放定律、Vendi Score）虽广泛应用，但其理论联系和优化效率存在空白。作者旨在建立统一理论框架并解决Vendi Score在大规模数据集上直接优化的计算瓶颈。

Method: 1) 证明神经缩放定律目标和Vendi Score的次模性；2) 将Vendi Score推广为矩阵谱函数族，包含DPP、Facility Location等；3) 引入弱矩阵单调函数概念推导弱次模目标；4) 开发基于割线方程的增量更新算法，避免重复特征值分解；5) 在ImageNet-1K等数据集上系统比较多种数据评估目标。

Result: 1) 提出的方法实现约35,000倍加速；2) Facility Location在多数场景中表现最优；3) Vendi Score在高值区间失效；4) 均匀随机子集在评估分数和下游性能上高度集中；5) 即使控制大小、类平衡和训练预算，性能仍有显著差异。

Conclusion: 数据价值评估不能仅依赖规模、类平衡和预算三个因素；Facility Location是当前最稳健的数据子集选择准则；Vendi Score需谨慎使用（避免过度优化）；提出的优化框架使次模目标在大规模数据上可行。

Abstract: Neural scaling laws appraise data through dataset size, while the Vendi Score uses quantum entropy to measure dataset value. We show both that common neural-scaling-law objectives and the Vendi Score are submodular. We further show that the Vendi Score is a special case of a broader class of submodular objectives that we call matrix spectral functions. This also includes determinantal (DPP) objectives, as well as many others. We also introduce weakly matrix monotone functions and show how they lead to weakly submodular matrix spectral functions, yielding a broad family of practical objectives for data appraisal. We develop secular-equation-based updates that avoid repeated eigendecompositions during greedy optimization, reducing marginal-gain evaluation for $m$-dimensional embeddings by an $O(m)$ factor relative to oracle queries. This yields an average empirical speedup of about 35,000x, making direct optimization of the Vendi Score feasible on ImageNet-1K-scale datasets. Thus enabled, we compare how well several objectives predict the value of training subsets for held-out test performance under fixed-size, class-balanced, and fixed training-budget regimes, including the Vendi Score, DPPs, facility location, and three new matrix spectral variants. Across multiple datasets, facility location performs the best. Direct optimization also reveals that, while the Vendi Score is predictive over moderate score ranges, pushing the objective to higher values can make it a poor downstream performance proxy. We also find that uniformly at random fixed-size subsets, both unconstrained and class-balanced, are remarkably concentrated in both appraisal scores and held-out performance. Finally, we show that size, class balance, and training budget do not alone determine data value: even when controlling for these factors, performance ranges smoothly from good to bad.

</details>


### [537] [Forget Less, Generalize More: Unifying Temporal and Structural Adaptation for Dynamic Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29453)
*Qian Chang,Ciprian Doru Giurcaneanu,Runsong Jia,Xia Li,Guoping Hu,Xiufeng Cheng,Jinqing Yang,Mengjia Wu,Yi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Dual-Scale Retentive Dynamics (DSRD)框架，通过可学习的时间敏感衰减核与双尺度状态更新，统一建模动态图中的时序依赖与结构传播，在14个基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态图表示学习方法大多采用固定的时序衰减方案或预设的结构传播深度，导致难以泛化到具有不同交互频率和拓扑特征的图数据。

Method: 提出DSRD框架，包含两个核心组件：(i) 双尺度自适应保留状态，在一个统一循环公式中联合建模时序动态和结构传播；(ii) 自适应衰减核，通过可学习的时间敏感参数自动平衡短期响应与长期记忆。

Result: 在14个真实基准数据集上，DSRD在链接预测和节点分类任务中均达到SOTA性能，并在直推式与归纳式设置下展现强泛化能力。

Conclusion: DSRD通过可学习的自适应机制替代固定衰减与固定深度，有效解决了动态图表示学习中的泛化瓶颈，且理论证明了并行聚合与循环更新的等价性及学习的稳定性。

Abstract: Representation learning on dynamic graphs requires capturing complex dependencies that evolve across both time and structure. Existing approaches typically adopt fixed temporal decay schemes or predetermined structural propagation depths, limiting their ability to generalize across graphs with diverse interaction frequencies and topological characteristics. We propose Dual-Scale Retentive Dynamics (DSRD), a unified framework that maintains a retentive representation state encoding both temporal memory and structural context. DSRD introduces two key components: (i) a retentive state with dual-scale adaptation that jointly models temporal dynamics and structural propagation within a single recurrent formulation, and (ii) adaptive decay kernels with learnable time-sensitivity parameters that automatically balance short-term responsiveness and long-term retention based on the underlying interaction patterns. We provide theoretical analysis establishing the equivalence between event-wise parallel aggregation and efficient recurrent state updates, as well as stability and boundedness guarantees for the learned dynamics. Extensive experiments on 14 real-world benchmarks demonstrate that DSRD consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on both link prediction and node classification tasks, with strong generalization across transductive and inductive settings.

</details>


### [538] [A Full-Pipeline Framework for Evaluating Membership Inference Attacks in Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29454)
*Ding Chen,Xinwen Cheng,Xuyang Zhong,Xinping Chen,Xiaolin Huang,Chen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个系统性的评估框架，用于分析不同上下文（数据、架构、算法、后训练模块）对成员推理攻击（MIA）效果的影响，并提供了标准化威胁模型、三指标评估体系（平衡准确率、TPR@低FPR、TNR@低FNR）以及实用审计工具包。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MIA研究缺乏系统性的评估框架来考量不同实际场景（如误分类成本不对称、威胁模型差异）对攻击效果的影响，导致在真实数据集上部署时统计显著性不足。

Method: 构建涵盖数据、架构、算法和后训练模块的全链路评估框架；形式化两种标准化威胁模型；采用平衡准确率、TPR@低FPR、TNR@低FNR三个互补指标；将现有MIA适配到标准化威胁模型下进行公平对比。

Result: 实验表明MIA的有效性对威胁模型和评估指标高度敏感；不同MIA方法在不同上下文下的表现差异显著。

Conclusion: 将发现转化为可操作的指南，并提供即用型审计工具包，帮助从业者在实际场景中进行更好的隐私评估。

Abstract: While Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) are the prevailing method for identifying training data, their application has expanded into privacy auditing and machine unlearning. Nevertheless, the field lacks a systematic framework for evaluating how different contexts affect MIA efficacy. Without such a characterization, practitioners risk deploying algorithms that perform well on benchmarks but become statistically irrelevant when faced with the nuances of specific, real-world datasets. To bridge this gap and provide actionable insights, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework that systematically characterizes privacy risks across the entire machine learning pipeline, spanning data, architectures, algorithms, and post-training modules. Designed to inherently capture diverse operational contexts, our framework rigorously evaluates state-of-the-art MIAs across a broad spectrum of training configurations. To account for varying misclassification costs in real-world deployments, we employ three complementary metrics: Balanced Accuracy for symmetric costs, alongside TPR at low FPR (or TNR at low FNR) for asymmetric scenarios where false alarms or missed detections are strictly penalized. Furthermore, recognizing that existing MIAs assume divergent adversary capabilities, we formalize two standardized threat models and adapt these attacks into corresponding variants to ensure an equitable benchmark. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that the efficacy of specific MIA methodologies is highly sensitive to the assumed threat models and chosen evaluation metrics. Ultimately, we distill these findings into actionable guidelines and provide a ready-to-use auditing toolkit, empowering practitioners to conduct better privacy assessments.

</details>


### [539] [Honest Lying: Understanding Memory Confabulation in Reflexive Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29463)
*Prakhar Dixit,Sadia Kamal,Tim Oates*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了"反思式"智能体在记忆回放时可能产生"记忆虚构"（memory confabulation）——智能体存储并反复依赖错误的任务解读，即使环境已正确重置。作者提出RRR指标用于检测此现象，并提出用程序化轨迹信号替代开放式自我诊断的缓解方法，显著提升了正确目标提及率并解决部分冻结环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反思式智能体（Reflexion-style agents）普遍假设智能体能够准确诊断自身失败并进行自我修正，但作者质疑这一假设在实际场景中可能系统性失效，从而引发错误记忆固化的风险。

Method: 1. 定义并量化"记忆虚构"现象，提出"反思重复率"（Reflection Repetition Rate, RRR）作为检测指标；2. 在ALFWorld和HumanEval两个基准上进行实验，识别冻结环境；3. 提出缓解方法：用程序化提取轨迹级失败信号替代开放式自我诊断。

Result: 在ALFWorld中发现16个冻结环境（121条反思中0条提到正确目标对象），HumanEval中发现4个类似案例。缓解方法将正确目标提及率从0%提升至86%，RRR从0.64降至0.10，并解决了16个冻结环境中的3个。

Conclusion: 反思式记忆可能强化而非纠正错误信念，简单的自我反思机制存在根本性缺陷，需要更可靠的失败信号机制来避免记忆虚构的累积效应。

Abstract: Reflexion-style agents rely on self-generated reflections as memory, implicitly assuming that agents can accurately diagnose their own failures.We show that this assumption can fail systematically: across ALFWorld and HumanEval, agents store confident but incorrect interpretations of the task and continue acting on them across trials,even though the environment resets to the correct task each time. We call this failure mode memory confabulation and introduce the Reflection Repetition Rate (RRR), a log-based metric that detects repeated reliance on incorrect reflective content.Using RRR, we identify 16 frozen environments in ALFWorld, where 0 of 121 reflections mention the correct target object, and 4 analogous cases in HumanEval. Our mitigation replaces open-ended self-diagnosis with programmatic extraction of trajectory-level failure signals, increasing correct object mention from 0% to 86%, reducing RRR from 0.64 to 0.10, and solving 3 of 16 frozen ALFWorld environments, suggesting that reflective memory can reinforce false beliefs rather than correct them.

</details>


### [540] [Composing Non-Conjugate Factor Graphs with Closed-Form Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29467)
*Mykola Lukashchuk,Kyrylo Yemets,Wouter M. Kouw,Dmitry Bagaev,İsmail Şenöz,Jeff Beck,Bert de Vries*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在深层概率模型中保持闭式推理的方法，通过识别五种因子图基元（双线性因子、指数链接、Gamma先验、高斯似然和平等节点），证明任何由这些基元组成的模型在平均场分解下都能进行闭式变分消息传递。通过堆叠路由层可以编码任意决策树，实现通用函数逼近，并在集成时间序列预测中展示了校准的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将概率构建块堆叠成更深层的架构通常会破坏闭式推理，作者旨在解决这一痛点，寻找一种既能构建深层概率模型又能保持闭式推理可处理性的方法。

Method: 识别五种因子图基元（双线性因子、指数链接、Gamma先验、高斯似然、平等节点），证明其组合在平均场变分消息传递中保持闭式形式；通过堆叠路由层编码决策树，实现通用函数逼近。

Result: 静态集成→输入依赖门控→分支路由，证明了堆叠路由层可编码任意决策树，实现通用函数逼近；在五个时间序列基准数据集上，该方法提供了校准的不确定性估计。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可保持闭式推理的深层概率模型构建框架，在贝叶斯混合专家模型中实现了专家选择的推断（而非学习），提供了校准的不确定性，具有理论与应用价值。

Abstract: Stacking probabilistic building blocks into deeper architectures typically breaks closed-form inference. We show that closed-form inference can be preserved. We identify five factor-graph primitives: a bilinear factor, an exponential link, a Gamma prior, a Gaussian likelihood, and an equality node, and prove that any model composed from them admits closed-form variational message passing. The construction works because each primitive preserves a small set of message families: under mean-field factorization, messages on Gaussian variables remain Gaussian and messages on precision variables remain Gamma, while the only non-conjugate interface, the exponential link, remains tractable through the Gaussian moment-generating function and the sufficient statistics of the Gamma family. We demonstrate composition at increasing depth, from static ensembles through input-dependent gating to split-branch routing, and show that stacking routing layers encodes arbitrary decision trees, establishing universal function approximation with closed-form inference. Applied to ensemble time-series forecasting, the framework yields a Bayesian mixture of experts in which gating functions are inferred rather than learned, providing calibrated uncertainty over expert selection across five benchmark datasets.

</details>


### [541] [Access Sets Matter: Budgeting Expert Reads for Scalable Weight-Space Model Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29489)
*Yuanyi Wang,Yanggan Gu,Su Lu,Yifan Yang,Zhaoyi Yan,Congkai Xie,Jianmin Wu,Hongxia Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MergePipe 是一种预算感知的 LLM 模型合并执行层，通过将合并问题建模为专家访问集问题，在给定 I/O 预算下选择性地读取专家权重块，实现了高达 11 倍的加速和数量级的 I/O 减少，同时保持参数偏差在 10^{-3} 量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模 LLM 合并场景中，主要的资源瓶颈不是计算，而是必须读取的专家权重集合的 I/O 开销。现有方法未显式考虑这一限制。

Method: 提出 MergePipe：将 LLM 合并建模为专家访问集问题，对参数块建立索引，在显式 I/O 预算下构建确定性访问计划，通过可重放清单执行预算受限的合并。对于固定系数加法算子，遗漏更新的误差由省略的 delta 范数界定。

Result: 在 Qwen 和 Llama 合并任务上，专家读取 I/O 减少最多一个数量级，速度提升高达 11 倍；参数偏差仅约 O(10^{-3})，下游基准测试无单调退化。

Conclusion: MergePipe 证明了在 I/O 预算约束下进行大规模 LLM 合并的可行性，为资源受限场景下的模型融合提供了高效的实用方案。

Abstract: Weight-space model merging is usually formulated as an algebraic operation on checkpoints, yet at LLM scale the limiting resource is often the set of expert weights that must be read. We introduce MergePipe, a budget-aware execution layer that casts LLM merging as an \emph{expert access-set} problem: given a merge operator and a checkpoint family in a shared weight coordinate system, choose which expert delta blocks to access under an explicit I/O budget. MergePipe indexes parameter blocks, builds deterministic access plans, and executes the induced budgeted merge with replayable manifests. The plan is budget-sound by construction and recovers the full-read merge at full budget; for fixed-coefficient additive operators, the omitted-update error is bounded by the norm of omitted deltas. Across Qwen and Llama merging workloads, MergePipe reduces expert-read I/O by up to an order of magnitude and achieves up to $11\times$ speedups. Representative budget sweeps show $O(10^{-3})$ parameter deviation from full-read merges and no monotonic degradation on downstream benchmarks.

</details>


### [542] [Gradient Perturbation: Learning to Perturb Gradients for Adaptive Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29494)
*Hua Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出梯度扰动的统一框架，发现SAM、梯度裁剪、梯度噪声注入等方法均可视为梯度扰动的特例，并据此提出LPG（学习扰动梯度）方法，自适应地在类别级别扰动logit层梯度，实现类别感知训练，在平衡/长尾分类和噪声标签学习任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前向传播中的扰动（特征、logit、标签）已被广泛研究，但反向传播中的梯度扰动缺乏系统性探索。作者希望能建立梯度扰动的统一视角，并借鉴Logit Perturbation Learning的思想，设计自适应的类别级梯度扰动方法。

Method: 1）建立梯度扰动的统一框架，将SAM、梯度裁剪、梯度噪声注入等归结为不同形式的梯度扰动；2）提出LPG方法，在类别级别自适应地扰动logit层的梯度——放大某类梯度视为正增强，抑制视为负增强；3）通过PAC-Bayes分析建立梯度扰动边界与泛化保证的理论联系。

Result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和噪声标签学习三个任务上，LPG一致优于现有方法，且可作为即插即用模块与现有方法结合使用。

Conclusion: 梯度扰动是一个尚未被充分探索但极具潜力的方向，LPG通过类别自适应的梯度扰动有效实现了类别感知训练，为深度学习训练提供了新视角和实用工具。

Abstract: Deep neural network training involves both forward propagation (from features through logits to loss) and backward propagation (from loss through gradients to parameter updates). While perturbations along the forward chain, including feature perturbation, logit perturbation, and label perturbation, have been extensively studied, the backward chain's gradient perturbation has received little systematic investigation. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for gradient perturbation, revealing that existing methods such as Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), gradient clipping, and gradient noise injection can all be interpreted as imposing specific forms of gradient perturbation. Analogous to the recently proposed Logit Perturbation Learning (LPL), we conjecture that amplifying the gradient norm for a class acts as positive augmentation (enhancing learning), while dampening it acts as negative augmentation (suppressing overfitting). Based on these observations, we propose Learning to Perturb Gradients (LPG), which adaptively perturbs logit-level gradients at the class level to achieve category-aware training. We also establish theoretical connections between gradient perturbation bounds and generalization guarantees via PAC-Bayesian analysis. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and noisy label learning demonstrate that LPG consistently outperforms existing methods and can be combined with them as a plug-in module.

</details>


### [543] [On-Policy Replay for Continual Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29495)
*Yan Chen,Taojie Zhu,Meng Zhang,Xin Chen,Jiaqi Huang,Dongyang Xu,Yizhi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出On-Policy Replay (OPR)方法，通过回放模型自身生成的高质量响应来缓解持续微调中的灾难性遗忘，无需教师模型或辅助损失，在三个7-8B模型上显著降低遗忘（|BWT|降低42-46%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续监督微调（SFT）在适应多任务流时存在灾难性遗忘问题，现有on-policy方法虽能缓解遗忘但需要额外前向传播、对调度敏感且存在风格漂移。本文希望在不引入复杂训练目标的前提下利用on-policy信号缓解遗忘。

Method: 提出On-Policy Replay (OPR)：使用最新检查点对少量历史提示进行生成，经任务奖励筛选后，将幸存（提示, 模型回答）对作为普通SFT样本回放。无需教师模型、无辅助损失、无需实时蒸馏。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct、Qwen3-8B、Llama3.1-8B-Instruct三个模型上，OPR持续降低遗忘。以Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct为例，将BWT从-13.93提升至-0.65（10%回放预算），|BWT|较Vanilla Replay降低46%。还发现低分回放效果比Vanilla Replay更差，证明核心是on-policy分布而非响应质量。

Conclusion: OPR通过将on-policy信号路由到数据源而非训练目标，实现了简单高效的持续学习，并给出了KL收缩解释将OPR与先前的on-policy蒸馏方法统一在同一轴上。

Abstract: Continual supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the de facto recipe for adapting large language models (LLMs) to a stream of downstream tasks, but it suffers from catastrophic forgetting of earlier capabilities. Recent work shows that on-policy signals -- training on the model's own outputs -- reduce forgetting more reliably than off-policy supervision. Existing on-policy methods route this signal through a new training objective (e.g., self-distillation losses with a teacher copy), inheriting an extra forward pass, schedule sensitivity, and stylistic drift from the teacher.We instead route the on-policy signal through the training data source. Our method, On-Policy Replay (OPR), rolls out the most recent checkpoint on a small budget of historical prompts, filters the generations by a task reward, and replays the surviving (prompt, model response) pairs as ordinary SFT examples. There is no teacher, no auxiliary loss, and no on-the-fly distillation. Across three 7--8B instruction-tuned backbones (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Qwen3-8B, Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) on the TRACE continual-learning benchmark, OPR consistently reduces forgetting; on the sharpest stress test (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Sequential SFT BWT -13.93), OPR lifts BWT to -0.65 at a 10% replay budget and to -2.29 at a 1% budget -- a 46% reduction in |BWT| over a tuned Vanilla Replay baseline, with 42--46% reductions observed across all three backbones. We give a KL-shrinkage interpretation that places OPR and prior on-policy distillation methods on a single axis, and we present a counterintuitive finding that explains why Vanilla Replay is already a strong baseline: low-score replay is uniformly worse than Vanilla Replay, demonstrating that the active ingredient in OPR is the on-policy distribution, not the response quality alone.Our code is available at https://github.com/Yancey2024/OnPolicyReplay.

</details>


### [544] [Convex Basins in Single-Index Model Loss Landscapes: Applications to Robust Recovery under Strong Adversarial Corruption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29497)
*Santanu Das,Sagnik Chatterjee,Jatin Batra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个针对非单调链接函数（如GeLU、Swish）的高斯单指标模型鲁棒恢复算法，在存在重尾噪声和对抗性污染的情况下，实现了近线性样本复杂度和时间复杂度，证明了在对抗污染下存在维度无关的凸邻域，并通过鲁棒谱初始化高效可达。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒恢复方法适用于线性回归、严格单调链接函数和相位恢复等场景，但无法推广至非对称非单调链接函数（如GeLU和Swish），这些函数在现代门控神经网络中普遍存在，但缺乏鲁棒恢复的理论保证。

Method: 核心贡献在于对高斯平方损失函数在对抗污染下的结构理解：证明了一类非线性非单调SIM在真实参数周围存在维度无关的常数半径凸邻域，且该邻域可通过鲁棒谱初始化在对抗污染下高效到达，从而为鲁棒梯度下降提供有效的热启动。

Result: 算法在$\tilde{O}(nd)$时间和$\tilde{O}(d)$样本复杂度下实现最终估计误差$O(\sigma\sqrt{\varepsilon})$，其中$\varepsilon$为污染比例。

Conclusion: 该工作首次为广泛非线性非单调SIM族提供了鲁棒恢复保证，填补了此前完全未知的技术空白，为现代神经网络架构中出现的非线性激活函数提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: We study the problem of robustly learning Gaussian Single Index Models (SIMs) in the presence of heavy-tailed noise and a constant fraction of adversarially corrupted covariates and responses. Prior work on robust recovery has considered settings such as linear regression (Pensia et al., JASA 2024), strictly monotonic link functions (Awasthi et al., NeurIPS 2022), and phase retrieval (Buna and Rebeschini, AISTATS 2025). However, these techniques do not extend to generic asymmetric non-monotonic link functions such as \textsc{GeLU} and \textsc{Swish}, which arise naturally as scalar primitives in modern gated neural architectures. We close this gap by giving the first robust recovery algorithm with near-linear sample and time complexity for generic non-monotonic link functions, thereby establishing the first robust recovery guarantees for a broad family of nonlinear SIMs for which \textit{no guarantees were previously known}. Our central contribution is a new structural understanding of the Gaussian squared-loss landscape under adversarial contamination. Crucially, we prove that for a broad class of nonlinear non-monotonic SIMs, a dimension-independent, constant-radius convex basin exists around the ground truth and is efficiently reachable via robust spectral initialization even under adversarial contamination. Prior works fail to establish both guarantees simultaneously, thereby either breaking down under adversarial contamination or failing to handle generic non-monotonic link functions. Together, these structural insights yield a principled warm start for robust gradient descent that provably converges to a final estimation error of $O(σ\sqrtε)$ in $\tilde{O}(nd)$ time with $\tilde{O}(d)$ samples, where $ε$ is the contamination fraction.

</details>


### [545] [Quotient DAGs for Off-Policy Evaluation:Forward-Flow Importance Sampling and Exact Slate Propensities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29500)
*Ziwen Xie,Shaowen Xiang,Hongyu He,Dianbo Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于商DAG（有向无环图）的离线评估方法，通过将等价的生成历史合并，利用前向流比率计算精确的无序倾向性分数，解决了自回归推荐系统中倾向性加权的高方差和计算效率问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准的重要性采样方法在评估时会考虑生成过程的细节（如推荐顺序），但下游评估任务可能只关注无序的结果（如未排序的推荐板），这引入了不必要的方差；同时，计算精确的无序倾向性需要枚举所有生成顺序，存在计算瓶颈。

Method: 引入商DAG视图，合并对评估等价的轨迹历史；通过目标策略与行为策略在合并图上的前向流比率分配权重；针对板推荐场景，提出Forward-DP算法，利用子集DAG动态规划计算精确的无序倾向性，避免阶乘级枚举。

Result: Forward-DP能够在不进行阶乘枚举的情况下计算出精确的倾向性分数，为依赖上下文的自回归板推荐系统提供了实用的倾向性评估和模型选择工具。

Conclusion: 商DAG方法和Forward-DP有效解决了自回归推荐系统中倾向性加权的高方差和计算复杂性问题，使离线评估更加准确和高效。

Abstract: Off-policy evaluation estimates how a target policy would perform using data collected by a different behavior policy, which is crucial when online testing is costly or risky, such as in recommendation or healthcare. Standard importance sampling reweights each logged trajectory, but it can treat details of the generation process as meaningful even when the evaluation target ignores them: for example, an autoregressive slate recommender may generate an ordered sequence of items while the reward and downstream estimator depend only on the unordered slate. This creates nuisance variance and a computational gap, since exact unordered slate propensities require summing over all generation orders. We introduce a quotient-DAG view that merges histories equivalent for evaluation and assigns weights using target-to-behavior forward-flow ratios on the merged graph. For slate recommendation under a set-sufficient next-item interface, this yields Forward-DP, a subset-DAG dynamic program that computes exact unordered propensities without factorial enumeration. The resulting propensity primitive enables practical propensity-based evaluation and model selection for context-dependent autoregressive slate loggers.

</details>


### [546] [K-FinHallu: A Hallucination Detection Benchmark for Multi-Turn RAG in Korean Finance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29523)
*Eunbyeol Cho,Yunseung Lee,Mirae Kim,Jeewon Yang,Youngjun Kwak,Edward Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: K-FinHallu는 한국 금융 RAG 환경에서 멀티턴 맥락의 환각 탐지를 위한 최초의 벤치마크로, 정당한 중단(justified abstention)을 포함한 계층적 분류체계를 제안한다. 최신 LLM들도 미세한 금융 진단과 거절 행동에 어려움을 겪으며, 정당한 중단이 가장 취약한 축으로 나타났다.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 기존 환각 탐지 벤치마크는 단일 턴, 영어 중심 태스크에 집중되어 있어 한국 금융 도메인의 멀티턴 역학 및 언어-규제적 미묘함을 다루지 못한다. 또한 고위험 환경에서 LLM 배포의 핵심 장벽인 환각 문제를 해결하기 위해, 한국 금융 RAG 특화 벤치마크가 필요하다.

Method: 한국 금융 문서에서 멀티턴 대화를 구축하고, 맥락 응답 가능성(context answerability)에 기반한 계층적 환각 분류체계를 제안하여 정당한 중단(justified abstention)을 명시적으로 고려한다. 프론티어 및 오픈소스 LLM을 환각 탐지기로 벤치마킹하고, 8B 모델을 파인튜닝하여 성능을 비교한다.

Result: 최고 성능 모델도 세밀한 금융 진단 및 거절 행동(refusal behavior)에 어려움을 겪었다. 파인튜닝된 8B 모델이 프론티어 LLM에 준하는 성능을 보였으나, 정당한 중단(justified abstention)은 모든 평가 모델에서 가장 취약한 축으로 나타났다.

Conclusion: 한국 금융 도메인의 멀티턴 RAG 환경에서 환각 탐지는 여전히 어려운 과제이며, 특히 정당한 중단을 올바르게 수행하는 능력이 모든 모델에서 부족하다. 이는 고위험 금융 환경에서 LLM의 실용적 배포를 위해 추가 연구가 필요함을 시사한다.

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced financial automation through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), yet hallucinations remain a critical barrier to deployment in high-stakes environments. Existing benchmarks focus on single-turn, English-centric tasks, leaving the multi-turn dynamics and linguistic-regulatory nuances of the Korean financial domain unaddressed. We introduce K-FinHallu, the first benchmark for hallucination detection in multi-turn Korean financial RAG. We construct multi-turn dialogues from authentic Korean financial documents and inject hallucinations under a proposed hierarchical taxonomy based on context answerability that explicitly accounts for justified abstention. Benchmarking frontier and open-source LLMs as hallucination detectors, we find that even the strongest models struggle with fine-grained financial diagnostics and refusal behavior. While fine-tuning an 8B model on our training split yields performance competitive with frontier LLMs, justified abstention remains the weakest axis across all evaluated models.

</details>


### [547] [Learning to Perturb Hidden Representations for Generalizable Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29525)
*Hua Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个统一的隐藏激活扰动框架，并设计LPA方法，通过自适应学习类别级激活扰动，在多个任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究系统探索了输入、logit和标签层面的扰动，但中间隐藏激活（网络计算的主体）缺乏统一的扰动分析框架。

Method: 提出LPA（Learning to Perturb Activations），在选定的隐藏层上通过PGD学习类别级的自适应扰动。

Result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和领域泛化任务上，LPA一致优于现有方法，并能与logit扰动方法（如LPL）互补。

Conclusion: 隐藏激活扰动可统一解释Dropout、Manifold Mixup等现有方法，扩张性扰动为正增强，收缩性为负增强，浅层扰动类似输入增强，深层扰动类似logit操作。

Abstract: Deep neural networks process data through a cascade of representations: input features, hidden activations, logits, and loss. While perturbations at the input, logit, and label levels have been systematically studied, the intermediate hidden activations, which constitute the bulk of the network's computation, have received no unified perturbation analysis. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for hidden activation perturbation, revealing that Dropout, Manifold Mixup, adversarial feature perturbation, and related methods all impose specific forms of activation perturbation but with class-agnostic or random strategies. We conjecture that expansive perturbation (increasing activation norm) acts as positive augmentation, while contractive perturbation (decreasing activation norm) acts as negative augmentation, and that the perturbation layer determines whether the effect resembles input-level augmentation (shallow layers) or logit-level manipulation (deep layers). We propose Learning to Perturb Activations (LPA), which adaptively perturbs activations at a selected hidden layer with class-level perturbations learned via PGD. We further provide theoretical analysis connecting activation perturbation to flat minima and perturbation amplification through layers. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and domain generalization demonstrate that LPA consistently outperforms existing methods and provides complementary benefits to logit perturbation methods such as LPL.

</details>


### [548] [AsymVLM: Asymmetric Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29535)
*Yilin Feng,Ahmed Burak Gulhan,Mahmut Taylan Kandemir*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AsymVLM方法，利用视觉和文本令牌的不同特性（视觉冗余可剪枝，文本因果依赖需驱逐），分别采用自适应剪枝和阈值驱逐策略，在保持准确率的同时实现高达54%的FLOPs节省，尤其在文档和图表理解任务上优于现有方法2-3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有压缩方法对视觉和文本令牌采用统一处理，忽略了二者根本不同的特性：视觉令牌空间冗余且主导预填充阶段，文本令牌因果依赖且在解码阶段累积。因此需要针对性地设计非对称压缩策略。

Method: 1. 视觉令牌：使用学习的重要性评分器进行激进剪枝，并采用每样本自适应预算分配；2. 文本令牌：采用基于时间阈值的驱逐策略，仅在超过固定预算时触发，适应VLM的短上下文特性。

Result: 最高实现54%的FLOPs节省，在文档和图表理解任务上比现有方法高2-3%，在文本主导场景下显著优于标准LLM缓存压缩方法。

Conclusion: 非对称处理视觉和文本令牌的压缩策略更有效，能在保持整体准确率的同时大幅降低计算开销，尤其适用于视觉信息空间局部化、查询特定的任务。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process thousands of visual tokens per image alongside comparatively few text tokens, yet existing compression methods treat both modalities uniformly. We observe that the two modalities have fundamentally different properties: vision tokens are spatially redundant and dominate prefill, while text tokens are causally dependent and accumulate during decoding. Based on this asymmetry, we propose and empirically evaluate AsymVLM, which applies aggressive pruning to vision tokens before prefill using a learned importance scorer with per-sample adaptive budgeting, and temporal threshold-based eviction to text tokens only when they exceed a fixed budget. Our experiments indicate that AsymVLM achieves the highest FLOPs savings (up to 54%) among state-of-the-art methods while outperforming existing approaches by 2--3% on document and chart understanding tasks where visual information is spatially localized and query-specific, and maintaining competitive accuracy on holistic benchmarks. In text-dominated scenarios, our eviction strategy substantially outperforms standard LLM cache compression methods by adapting to the short-context nature of VLM.

</details>


### [549] [Singularity-aware Optimization via Randomized Geometric Probing: Towards Stable Non-smooth Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29547)
*Ruoran Xu,Borong She,Xiaobo Jin,Qiufeng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出S-Adam优化器，通过局部几何不稳定性(LGI)度量动态调节步长，解决非光滑损失景观下自适应优化器的梯度震颤问题，在量化感知训练等高噪声场景下提升准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代深度学习架构(如ReLU激活、量化算子)引入非光滑组件，破坏了平滑损失景观假设，导致Adam等自适应优化器出现梯度震颤，收敛差且泛化次优。

Method: 提出S-Adam优化器，核心贡献包括：(1) LGI度量——基于随机化方向导数方差估计Clarke次微分直径；(2) 自适应阻尼机制exp(-λρ)，在高不稳定区域减速更新，平滑盆地保持快速收敛；(3) 使用微分包含进行收敛性分析。

Result: 在CIFAR-100上提升6%准确率，在TinyImageNet上提升3%准确率，优于AdamW和Prox-SGD，有效缓解梯度振荡。

Conclusion: S-Adam在非光滑优化场景下具有理论保证(几乎必然收敛到(δ,ε)-Clarke稳定点，O(1/√T)最优率)和显著实证优势，为量化感知训练等高噪声任务提供了稳定高效的优化方案。

Abstract: Deep learning optimization relies heavily on the assumption of smooth loss landscapes, a condition systematically violated by modern architectures due to non-smooth components such as ReLU activations and quantization operators. In such non-smooth regimes, adaptive optimizers such as Adam suffer from gradient chattering, violent oscillations caused by conflicting signals within the Clarke subdifferential, leading to poor convergence and suboptimal generalization. To address this, we introduce Singularity-aware Adam (S-Adam), a novel optimizer that stabilizes training by dynamically modulating step sizes based on local geometric instability. Our key contribution is the Local Geometric Instability (LGI) metric, a computationally efficient estimator of the Clarke subdifferential diameter derived from the variance of randomized directional derivatives. S-Adam incorporates an adaptive damping mechanism exp(-$λ$$ρ$) that decelerates updates in high-instability regions while preserving fast convergence in smooth basins. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis using differential inclusions, proving that S-Adam converges almost surely to ($δ$,$ε$)-Clarke stationary points at the optimal O(1/$\sqrt(T)$) rate. Empirical evaluations on Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) and high-noise small-batch learning demonstrate that S-Adam consistently outperforms AdamW and Prox-SGD, achieving accuracy gains of up to 6 percent on CIFAR-100 and 3 percent on TinyImageNet while effectively mitigating gradient oscillations.

</details>


### [550] [Why Larger Models Learn More: Effects of Capacity, Interference, and Rare-Task Retention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29548)
*Jing Huang,Daniel Wurgaft,Rachit Bansal,Laura Ruis,Naomi Saphra,David Alvarez-Melis,Andrew Kyle Lampinen,Christopher Potts,Ekdeep Singh Lubana*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过理论论证和实验验证，提出更大模型能学习小模型无法学习的任务，原因在于数据驱动下的神经元资源竞争：小模型将资源优先分配给高频或低复杂度任务，而大模型通过减少梯度干扰机制，能分配足够资源给常见任务，从而保留稀有复杂任务的特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究为什么更大规模的模型能够学习到小规模模型无法学习的任务，即使训练数据无限，从而解释大模型在实践中表现更好的根本原因。

Method: 1) 提出基于幂律标度的现象学论证；2) 在混合任务的合成数据上研究模型规模效应；3) 在OLMo模型（4M到4B参数）上进行预训练验证，控制任务的频率和复杂度。

Result: 小模型优先学习高频或低复杂度任务，将神经元资源分配给这些任务；大模型通过减少梯度干扰机制，分配足够资源给常见任务，使得梯度更新变弱，不会覆盖稀有任务特征；OLMo模型实验证实仅有大模型能学习低频复杂任务，且大模型嵌入更多任务特征、梯度干扰更小。

Conclusion: 提供了一个以数据为中心的视角解释大模型为何优于小模型：模型规模增大缓解了数据驱动的资源竞争和梯度干扰，从而能够学习稀有复杂任务。这有助于指导模型规模选择和训练数据混合策略等实践问题。

Abstract: Larger models learn tasks smaller models do not. What drives this phenomenon? We develop a simple phenomenological argument that power-law scaling already suggests that a larger model will be able to learn a part of the data distribution that a smaller model fails to learn, even with infinite training data. To validate this claim and identify its causes, we study the effects of model scaling on a synthetic setup consisting of a mixture of tasks that show monotonic scaling curves. The results point to a data-induced competition over resources (neurons). Specifically, smaller models allocate their neurons to high frequency or low complexity tasks, and so they learn solutions that perform poorly on rare and complex tasks. Moreover, this happens even when solutions capable of expressing the desired task exist. We then assess how a larger model circumvents this data-centric bottleneck, finding that it traces to a reduced interference mechanism: larger models can allocate enough resources to common tasks that the gradient updates for those tasks become weak, which means that they do not overwrite rare-task features as they slowly accumulate. Finally, to further validate these claims, we pretrain OLMo models (4M to 4B parameters) on novel tasks of varying frequency and complexity. The results mirror those from our synthetic data experiments: only the larger OLMo models learn the infrequent and complex tasks, and these larger models embed more task features in their representations and show less gradient interference between tasks. Overall, we offer a data-centric account of why larger models learn tasks that smaller models fail to. This helps explain why larger models are better in practice, and it can inform practical questions concerning model sizing and training data mixtures.

</details>


### [551] [On the Construction and Implications of Low-Loss Valleys in LoRA-based Bayesian Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29580)
*Daniel Dold,Emanuel Sommer,Julius Kobialka,Oliver Dürr,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoRA-Curve，一种在LoRA参数空间中使用分段贝塞尔曲线连接多个独立最优解的方法，通过连续低损谷实现参数空间遍历与功能多样性之间的桥梁，在不牺牲性能的前提下提升了预测分布的互信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明LoRA微调中离散多模态方法（如深度集成）相比单模态方法优势有限，这与深度学习领域中集成独立最优解通常能提升泛化能力的观察相矛盾。作者旨在探究LoRA空间中是否存在连续低损谷结构连接独立最优解，以及这种结构能否带来局部或离散方法无法捕获的功能多样性。

Method: 提出LoRA-Curve，包含两种变体：1) 自由配置（Free）：联合优化所有控制点；2) 锚定配置（Anchored）：连接独立微调的LoRA最优解。结合平坦极小值扰动和Jensen-Shannon散度正则化项，在Qwen2.5 7B模型上对推理和分类基准进行实验。

Result: 1) 证明了路径连续性与损失沿曲线的Lipschitz正则性；2) 线性插值存在损失壁垒，而锚定多段曲线能通过连续低损谷连接独立最优解；3) 结合平坦极小值扰动和JS散度正则化后，在不牺牲性能的前提下显著提升了预测分布的互信息。

Conclusion: LoRA参数空间中确实存在连接独立最优解的连续低损谷结构，这种连续参数空间遍历能够带来功能多样性，弥补了离散或局部方法的不足。LoRA-Curve为LoRA微调中的不确定性估计和模型集成提供了新的理论视角和实用方法。

Abstract: While parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods like low-rank adaptation (LoRA) are standard for large language models, principled estimation of epistemic uncertainty remains challenging. Recent results in the LoRA regime suggest that discrete multi-mode approaches such as deep ensembles offer little benefit over single-mode methods. This contradicts broader observations in deep learning, where ensembling independent optima typically improves generalization, and linking these modes through continuous low-loss valleys further enhances Bayesian model averaging (BMA). Whether such structure exists in the LoRA space and whether it yields functional diversity missed by local or discrete methods has not been studied. We introduce LoRA-Curve, a segmented Bézier curve parameterization in the LoRA space, with two variants: a free configuration that jointly optimizes all control points, and an anchored configuration that connects independently fine-tuned LoRA optima. We prove pathwise continuity and Lipschitz regularity of the loss along the curve and empirically show, across reasoning and classification benchmarks with Qwen2.5 7B, that linear interpolation encounters loss barriers, while our anchored multi-segment curves connect independent optima through continuous low-loss valleys. Combined with flat-minima perturbations and a Jensen-Shannon divergence regularizer, LoRA-Curve yields measurably higher mutual information of the predictive distribution without sacrificing performance, and links continuous parameter-space traversal to functional diversity.

</details>


### [552] [PEARL: Training Socratic Tutors with Pedagogically Aligned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29582)
*Qikai Chang,Zhenrong Zhang,Linbo Chen,Pengfei Hu,Jianshu Zhang,Youhui Guo,Jun Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PEARL是一个面向苏格拉底式教学辅导的强化学习框架，通过可控学生模拟器、生成式奖励模型和稳定的多目标RL方案，仅用30B参数模型即可在多项基准上达到领先性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型作为教育辅导者时，缺乏渐进式苏格拉底引导能力，且面临学生模拟保真度低、教学奖励建模不明确、多目标优化不稳定等挑战。

Method: 提出PEARL框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 可控学生模拟器，解耦潜在认知状态与回复生成；(2) 生成式奖励模型，联合评估教学质量和答案正确性；(3) 稳定多目标RL方案，对每个维度的奖励离散化并聚合标准化优势，防止高方差目标主导更新。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，PEARL在开源模型中表现最佳，且仅用30B参数即可与领先的专有LLM竞争。

Conclusion: PEARL通过解耦认知建模、联合奖励评估和稳定的多目标优化，有效提升了LLM作为苏格拉底式教学辅导员的性能，验证了小模型通过精心设计的RL框架也能达到大模型水准。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise as educational tutors, yet effective tutoring requires more than solving problems: it must provide progressive Socratic guidance and balance multiple pedagogical objectives across multi-turn interactions. However, training such tutors remains challenging due to limited-fidelity and weakly controllable student simulation, under-specified pedagogical reward modeling, and unstable multi-objective optimization. To overcome these limitations, we propose PEARL, a pedagogically aligned reinforcement learning framework for training Socratic tutoring agents, consisting of three key components. First, we introduce a controllable student simulator that decouples latent cognitive states from response generation to model diverse abilities and misconceptions. Second, we develop a generative reward model that jointly evaluates pedagogical quality and objective correctness for policy optimization. Finally, we propose a stable multi-objective RL scheme that discretizes rewards within each dimension and aggregates normalized advantages across dimensions, preventing high-variance objectives from dominating updates. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that PEARL achieves the best performance among open-source models and remains competitive with leading proprietary LLMs, despite using only a 30B policy model.

</details>


### [553] [Cluster-Level Attention-Guided Parallel Decoding for Masked Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29607)
*Heqiang Qi,Wei Huang,Mingyuan Bai,Xiangming Meng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLAD是一种无需训练的聚类级解码方法，通过将连续高置信度token聚合成簇，并利用自注意力图进行冲突感知的并行提交，在MDLM上实现1.77x–8.47x加速，同时保持任务精度基本不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MDLM的训练无关采样器仅在token级别决定提交位置，但可靠预测往往以连续高置信度span的形式出现，表明并行提交的单位可以大于单个token。

Method: 1) 将相邻高置信度候选token聚类为置信诱导簇(CICs)，作为span级更新单元；2) 利用同一前向传播的自注意力图估计簇间依赖关系；3) 进行冲突感知的簇选择，并行提交相互兼容的CICs。

Result: 在LLaDA和Dream模型家族的4个推理与代码生成基准上，CLAD相对于Vanilla解码实现1.77x–8.47x加速，且在多数设置下任务精度基本可比。

Conclusion: 将并行提交的粒度从token提升到cluster级别，可以有效加速MDLM的推理过程且不牺牲性能。

Abstract: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) enable parallel decoding by predicting all masked positions at each denoising step, yet existing training-free samplers usually decide which positions to commit at token-level granularity. We revisit this granularity and observe that reliable predictions often emerge as contiguous high-confidence spans, suggesting that the unit of parallel commitment can be larger than a single token. We first group adjacent high-confidence candidates into confidence-induced clusters (CICs) as span-level update units. We then use self-attention maps from the same forward pass to estimate inter-cluster dependencies, enabling conflict-aware selection of mutually compatible CICs for parallel commitment. This yields CLAD (Cluster-Level Attention-Guided Decoding), a training-free cluster-level decoder for MDLMs. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream model families across four reasoning and code-generation benchmarks show that CLAD achieves 1.77x--8.47x speedups over Vanilla decoding while maintaining broadly comparable task accuracy in most settings.

</details>


### [554] [MōLe-Λ: Learning the Coupled-Cluster Response State for Energies, Gradients, and Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29622)
*Andreas Burger,Luca Thiede,Abdulrahman Aldossary,Jorge A. Campos-Gonzalez-Angulo,Alex Zook,Jérôme Florian Gonthier,Alán Aspuru-Guzik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MōLe-Λ，一种从局域化Hartree-Fock分子轨道同时学习CCSD左右手振幅的机器学习方法，能够高效预测能量、力、偶极矩、极化率、电子密度等可观测量，并保持计算速度优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 耦合簇(CC)理论虽被视为量子化学金标准，但计算成本高昂；许多重要可观测量需要左手Λ振幅，但现有方法未同时预测左右手振幅。

Method: MōLe-Λ在MōLe基础上扩展了Λ1和Λ2读出头，保持与T1/T2头对称性约束一致，保留原始等变轨道编码器、奇符号等变解码、局域性和大小广延性。

Result: 模型能精确预测CC级别的能量和力，同时恢复偶极矩、四极矩、极化率、电子密度以及双电子可观测量（如对密度）。

Conclusion: MōLe-Λ在保持MōLe速度优势的同时大幅扩展了可访问的量子化学性质，为相关量子化学提供了波函数级别的替代模型。

Abstract: Coupled-cluster (CC) theory is often considered the gold standard of quantum chemistry, but its high computational cost limits routine access to accurate energies, forces and response properties. While the right-hand $T$-amplitudes determine the correlated wavefunction, many practically important observables additionally require the left-hand $Λ$-amplitudes. We introduce MōLe-$Λ$, an extension of Molecular Orbital Learning (MōLe) that predicts the full ground-state coupled-cluster singles and doubles (CCSD) response state by jointly learning right-hand amplitudes $(T_1,T_2)$ and left-hand amplitudes $(Λ_1,Λ_2)$ from localized Hartree--Fock molecular orbitals. Architecturally, MōLe-$Λ$ extends MōLe with $Λ_1$ and $Λ_2$ readouts that mirror the symmetry constraints of the $T_1$ and $T_2$ heads, while preserving the original equivariant orbital encoder, odd sign-equivariant decoding, locality and size-extensivity. The resulting model yields accurate CC-quality energies and forces, while simultaneously recovering dipoles, quadrupoles, polarizabilities, the electron density, and 2-electron observables such as the pair density. We show that MōLe-$Λ$ further extends the speed advantage of MōLe over full CCSD while substantially expanding the accessible properties, providing a route to wavefunction-level surrogate models for correlated quantum chemistry.

</details>
